title: Transfer Learning Across Policy Regimes in Adaptive Multi-Agent Systems
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, 8 tables. Simulation-based methodological study of positive and negative transfer across adaptive policy regimes
summary: Policy models often assume that the relationship between a policy instrument and its outcome remains stable across institutional conditions. In adaptive socio-technical systems this assumption may fail: regulatory change can alter incentives, agents can respond strategically, and the mapping from policy variables to aggregate outcomes can change. This paper studies such regime change as a transfer-learning problem in adaptive multi-agent systems. A policy regime is represented as a learning problem induced by an observable input distribution and a target function mapping policy variables to outcomes. We compare a blank-slate learner that searches a flexible hypothesis class in the new regime with a transfer learner whose effective hypothesis class is restricted by structural knowledge from the previous regime. Transfer is beneficial when this restriction preserves the new target function while reducing effective complexity; it is harmful when the restriction excludes the new target and creates misspecification. A stylized emissions-regulation experimental environment and a dynamic ABM robustness experiment support the claim. When the target regime preserves an affine monotone tax-emissions relation, transfer improves empirical small-sample performance. When the target regime introduces a threshold break, the same transferred structure produces negative transfer: held-out error remains high, online prediction generates more mistakes, and repeated online streams show larger cumulative and final-window error under misspecification. The contribution is methodological: previous regulatory experience should be reused when it captures stable structural invariants, but treated cautiously when policy change alters the policy-outcome relationship.

AI.tldr: 本文研究政策体制变化下，迁移学习在自适应多智能体系统中的适用性：当政策-结果关系稳定时迁移有益，当出现阈值断裂时迁移有害。
AI.motivation: 传统政策模型假设政策工具与结果的关系在不同制度条件下保持稳定，但自适应社会技术系统中这一假设可能失效，监管变化会改变激励、智能体可能做出策略性响应，导致政策变量到结果的映射发生变化。
AI.method: 将政策体制变化建模为迁移学习问题，比较空白学习器（在新体制中搜索灵活假设类）与迁移学习器（受前体制结构性知识限制的假设类）。通过一个税-排放关系的实验环境和动态ABM鲁棒性实验进行验证。
AI.result: 当目标体制保持仿射单调的税-排放关系时，迁移学习提高了小样本性能；当目标体制引入阈值断裂时，相同的迁移结构产生负迁移，表现在留出误差高、在线预测错误多、累计和最终窗口误差大。
AI.conclusion: 提出方法论贡献：以往监管经验应在捕捉到稳定结构不变量时复用，但当政策改变改变了政策-结果关系时应谨慎对待。

title: RideGym: A Standardized Interface for Real-World Large-Scale Ride-Sharing System
summary: Ride-sharing has become an essential component of modern urban transportation and has attracted significant attention across computer science, transportation, and management science. While the field spans a broad range of problems, such as driver relocation, dynamic pricing, and vehicle charging or fueling dispatch, the core challenge remains order assignment and trip bundling, which directly affect urban traffic efficiency and carbon emissions. Despite its importance, existing simulation platforms are typically tailored to specific operational studies or tightly coupled to a particular dispatch algorithm, and rarely expose a standardized, learning-friendly interface. As a result, most researchers still build customized environments from scratch, raising serious concerns about reproducibility and fair comparison, and incurring substantial redundant effort. To address this gap, we present RideGym, the first open-source, standardized Gym-style interface tailored to MARL-based order dispatch in real-world ride-sharing systems. By fully decoupling the environment from the dispatch algorithm, RideGym enables diverse learning-based and model-based methods to be developed and compared under identical, fully specified conditions. It supports efficient, large-scale city-level simulations on real road networks, and offers flexible configurations for vehicle attributes, order specifications, and automatic shortest-path routing. We validate RideGym by reproducing several baselines, and demonstrate its high efficiency, with a one-hour simulation involving thousands of vehicles and tens of thousands of orders completed within one minute across all methods. Moreover, we reveal that the choice of exploration noise can significantly affect both the performance and the relative ranking of MARL solutions, an aspect often overlooked in prior work.

AI.tldr: RideGym是一个开源的、标准化的Gym风格模拟平台，用于基于MARL的网约车订单调度，支持城市级大规模仿真，并发现探索噪声显著影响MARL方法的性能与排名。
AI.motivation: 现有网约车仿真平台通常针对特定研究或与特定算法紧耦合，缺乏标准化、学习友好的接口，导致研究难以复现和公平比较，研发重复劳动严重。
AI.method: 提出RideGym，首个开源、标准化的Gym风格接口，将环境与调度算法完全解耦，支持大规模城市级仿真、灵活配置和自动最短路径路由。
AI.result: 重现多个基线方法，验证了高效性：涉及数千车辆和数万订单的一小时仿真可在1分钟内完成；发现探索噪声显著影响MARL性能与排名。
AI.conclusion: RideGym为网约车订单分配研究提供了标准化、可复现的基准平台，有助于推动该领域研究的公平比较与可复现性。

title: Distributed Agent System: Fault-Tolerant Collaboration Among Embodied Agents
summary: AI engineering is shifting from passive text generation by large language models (LLMs) to agent-driven task execution, creating new reliability challenges for long-horizon tasks under resource constraints and environmental uncertainty. Conventional error-elimination optimization strategies fail to address cumulative error propagation. This paper proposes Distributed Agent System (DAS), a device-edge-cloud framework for fault-tolerant collaboration among heterogeneous agents. We redefine agent reliability as system-level fault tolerance rather than single-turn zero-error accuracy, and present a two-layer fault-tolerance architecture: single-agent execution reliability via fault-tolerant alignment, and cross-agent communication reliability via semi-formal language protocols. This framework provides a practical engineering pathway for reliable heterogeneous embodied agents collaboration in industrial scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出分布式智能体系统（DAS），一种设备-边缘-云框架，通过容错对齐和半形式化语言协议实现异构智能体间的可靠协作，解决长时任务中的累积错误传播问题。
AI.motivation: 传统错误消除优化策略无法解决长期任务中的累积错误传播问题，LLM从被动文本生成转向智能体驱动的任务执行带来了新的可靠性挑战。
AI.method: 提出DAS框架，包含两层容错架构：1）单智能体执行可靠性：通过容错对齐实现；2）跨智能体通信可靠性：通过半形式化语言协议实现。
AI.result: 将智能体可靠性重新定义为系统级容错而非单轮零错误准确率，为工业场景下异构具身智能体协作提供了实用工程路径。
AI.conclusion: DAS框架为资源约束和环境不确定性下的长时任务提供了设备-边缘-云协同的容错方案，有效解决累积错误传播问题。

title: Auditing Belief-Conditioned LLM Agents in Hidden-Information Social Deduction Games
summary:
Evaluating LLM agents in hidden-information multi-agent settings is hard: final outcomes are high-variance and rarely reveal why an agent decided as it did. We study this in a 9-player Werewolf environment where agents act under strict, code-level information isolation, and we build an auditable framework that maintains an external belief state over hidden roles, logs belief updates and belief-action deviations as structured evidence, and supports a defensive offline improvement loop that reviews bad cases before any strategy change.
  Across 1,080 frozen games spanning belief-disabled, active-belief, kernel-ablation, camp-restricted, consumption-policy, and high-load arms, and including a seed-paired A0/A1 comparison, the active-belief condition is associated with substantially better good-side outcomes: in the 200-seed A0/A1 comparison the good-side win rate rises from 0.205 to 0.390 (paired McNemar $χ^2 = 16.4$, $p < 0.001$), with fewer irreversible witch-poison errors. We do not, however, attribute this shift to belief content. Direct action-belief consistency is low ($\approx 0.21$), and giving belief only to the werewolves helps the good side more than giving it only to the good side, which argues against a simple holder-benefit account; we therefore report the effect as an association and treat its mechanism as unresolved. The contribution is the audit framework itself: it makes the effect measurable, exposes low direct action-belief consistency, rejects an unreliable forced-consumption intervention with evidence, and separates strategy effects from load confounds. We accordingly position external belief in high-noise hidden-information games primarily as an auditable cognitive baseline that also carries decision-relevant signal, turning opaque agent behavior into replayable evidence for safer, controlled iteration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个可审计的框架，用于在隐藏信息多智能体狼人杀环境中评估LLM智能体，发现主动信念状态与好人阵营胜率提升相关（0.205→0.390），但直接行为-信念一致性很低（≈0.21），且机制尚未明确解释。
AI.motivation: 在隐藏信息多智能体设置中，评估LLM智能体很困难，因为最终结果方差大且难以揭示决策原因。
AI.method: 在9人狼人杀环境中，智能体在严格代码级信息隔离下运行，构建可审计框架维护外部信念状态，记录信念更新和信念-行为偏差，并支持离线防御性改进循环。
AI.result: 主动信念条件显著提升好人阵营胜率（0.205→0.390，p<0.001），但直接行动-信念一致性很低（≈0.21），且仅给狼人信念比仅给好人信念更有利于好人阵营。
AI.conclusion: 外部信念在高噪声隐藏信息游戏中主要作为可审计的认知基线，同时携带决策相关信息，将不透明的智能体行为转化为可回放的证据，用于更安全、受控的迭代。

title: CLIR-Bench: Benchmarking Multimodal Question Answering over Irregular Clinical Time Series
summary: Clinical time series are central to patient monitoring, risk assessment, and clinical decision support. However, they are often sparse, irregularly sampled, and asynchronous, making it difficult for models to identify the temporal evidence required for clinical Question Answering (QA). Existing benchmarks primarily focus on regularly sampled time-series QA or medical QA over static data, and therefore rarely assess whether models can faithfully ground their answers in irregular temporal observations. To fill this gap, we introduce CLIR-Bench, a benchmark for irregular clinical time series QA constructed from de-identified ICU records through a principled four-stage pipeline. CLIR-Bench contains 6,600 QA instances spanning 11 clinical variables, organized into four capability dimensions and 11 tasks. Each question is linked to explicit temporal evidence and task-specific answer derivation rules, enabling evaluation of both answer accuracy and evidence use. Experiments show that existing generalist models struggle to retrieve and reason over sparse clinical evidence, highlighting the need for stronger irregular time-series reasoning methods. Our code and data are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/winall/CLIR-Bench.

AI.tldr: CLIR-Bench是一个专门用于评估模型在不规则临床时间序列上进行问答能力的基准，包含6,600个QA实例，实验表明现有通用模型在此任务上表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要关注规则采样的时间序列QA或静态数据上的医学QA，缺乏对模型是否能在不规则时间观测中定位答案能力的评估。
AI.method: 从去标识化的ICU记录中通过四阶段流水线构建了CLIR-Bench基准，包含6,600个QA实例，覆盖11个临床变量、4个能力维度和11个任务，每个问题都有明确的时间证据和答案推导规则。
AI.result: 现有通用模型（如LLM/MLLM）在检索和推理稀疏临床证据方面表现困难，暴露出不规则时间序列推理能力的不足。
AI.conclusion: 需要开发更强的不规则时间序列推理方法来处理临床QA任务。

title: Unified Backbone Refinement for Diffusion Models via Internal-Latent Analysis
comment: 45 pages, 23 figures. Accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026
summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success across diverse domains, with performance closely related to the denoising backbones that parameterize the score function. In this paper, we present a systematic, phase-aware analysis of diffusion components and show that abrupt, early-stage fluctuations in deep latents are strongly associated with artifacts. Guided by these findings, we introduce DUNE (Diffusion Unified Network refiNEr), a training-free refinement framework that detects abrupt deviations in deep low-noise internal latents using a shared EMA-based criterion, and applies backbone-specific suppression to the detector-selected entries. Although derived from U-Net, the same detect-suppress principle extends naturally to Transformer-based diffusion models by acting on the latents of deep self-attention blocks. Extensive experiments across multiple backbones indicate that DUNE improves fidelity while reducing hallucinations, offering new insight into where and when diffusion backbones should be controlled.

AI.tldr: 提出DUNE框架，通过检测和抑制扩散模型深层潜变量中的早期突变，无需训练即可提升生成质量并减少幻觉。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型的性能高度依赖去噪骨干网络，但深层潜变量中的早期波动会导致伪影，现有方法缺乏对此的系统分析。
AI.method: 提出DUNE框架：1）用共享EMA标准检测深层低噪潜变量中的突变；2）对检测到的条目施加骨干网络特定的抑制操作。该原则可扩展到U-Net和Transformer两种骨干。
AI.result: 在多种骨干网络上实验表明，DUNE有效提升了生成保真度并减少了幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了扩散模型应在何时何处进行控制，提供了一种无需训练即可改善生成质量的通用方法。

title: Knowledge Graphs Meet Graph Neural Networks: A Comprehensive Survey
comment: Recently Accepted for publication in ACM Computing Surveys. This is the accepted manuscript version, and the final published version available at ACM Computing Surveys:https://doi.org/10.1145/3814608. Paper list at Github: https://github.com/sunxiaobei/awesome-gnn-based-knowledge-graphs
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm in Knowledge Graphs (KGs) due to their intrinsic ability to model graph-structured data. However, there remains a lack of a systematic review about GNN-based methodologies across the entire knowledge graph technologies pipeline. To address this gap, we first propose a novel two-level taxonomy framework for GNN-based knowledge graph technologies: the KG technologies pipeline and GNN-based perspective. Specifically, the knowledge graph technologies pipeline covers knowledge graph construction, knowledge graph embedding, knowledge reasoning and knowledge graph applications. Meanwhile, the GNN-based perspective provides a new categorization of knowledge graph technologies with GNN models, such as GCN, GAT, and HGNN. Then, we analyze the advantages of GNN technology based on the characteristics of different tasks in the knowledge graph lifecycle. Furthermore, we detailed review various GNN-based models for knowledge graph following the proposed taxonomy, and summarize strengths and limitations. Finally, we discuss unresolved challenges and outline promising directions for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性综述了基于图神经网络（GNN）的知识图谱技术全流程，提出了包含知识图谱技术流水线和GNN视角的两层分类框架，并总结了各类方法的优缺点及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏对GNN方法在知识图谱技术全流程中的系统性综述，现有分类体系不够全面。
AI.method: 提出两层分类框架：1）知识图谱技术流水线（构建、嵌入、推理、应用）；2）GNN模型视角（GCN、GAT、HGNN等）。据此对各类方法进行详细回顾与分析。
AI.result: 系统梳理了GNN在知识图谱各环节的应用，分析了不同任务下GNN技术的优势与局限。
AI.conclusion: 总结了当前面临的挑战，并指出了未来可能的研究方向。

title: From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation
summary: To provide a structured and interpretable assessment, we decompose the image-based diagnosis into components following the Toulmin model of argumentation. This model consists of a claim, grounds, warrant, qualifier, rebuttal, and backing. Consider a claim generated by a machine learning (ML) model for retinal diagnosis. Rather than accepting this claim at face value, one could either apply explainable AI (XAI) methods or adopt an argumentation-based approach. In our framework, a model specialized in biomarker extraction from images provides the grounds. The warrant-linking the grounds to the claim - is analyzed by an agent equipped with medical knowledge; in our architecture, this role is fulfilled by a MedGemma agent. The qualifier is determined based on the overall quantitative evaluation of both the warrant and grounds models. Finally, a rebuttal is constructed using image similarity measures computed with MedSigLip. All these components are presented to the human expert, enabling a more informed and critical assessment of the ML-generated diagnosis.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Toulmin论证模型的可解释视网膜诊断框架，将ML诊断分解为论据、主张、保证、限定词、反驳等组件，并利用MedGemma和MedSigLip等模型辅助专家评估。
AI.motivation: 现有ML诊断缺乏结构化、可解释的评估方法，传统黑箱模型或XAI方法难以让人类专家充分理解和质疑模型输出。
AI.method: 将Toulmin论证模型分解到图像诊断中：用专用模型提取生物标志物作为论据，MedGemma代理基于医学知识分析保证，MedSigLip计算图像相似度构建反驳，综合评估确定限定词。
AI.result: 提出了一种结构化的论证框架，所有组件呈现给人类专家，支持更有根据的临床判断。
AI.conclusion: 该论证方法比传统XAI提供更透明、可交互的诊断解释，有助于增强专家对ML诊断的信任与批判性评估。

title: Multi-Agent LLMs Fail to Explore Each Other
summary: Exploration is essential for reliable autonomy in multi-agent systems, yet it remains unclear whether large language model (LLM) agents can explore effectively when interacting with one another. We show that modern LLM agents fail to do so, often exhibiting myopic and polarized interaction patterns that lead to suboptimal coordination and increased regret. We formalize this challenge as the Multi-Agent Exploration problem, modeling it as a partially observable stochastic game (POSG) problem in which agents must probe peers to infer their capabilities and identify effective interaction strategies. To address this, we introduce Multi- Agent Contextual Exploration (MACE), a lightweight framework that explicitly promotes exploration through structured peer selection. Across both contextual and parametric diversity settings, MACE substantially improves exploration behavior and downstream task performance. We further show theoretically that the value of exploration increases with agent diversity. Overall, our results highlight a fundamental limitation of current LLM agents and underscore the importance of explicitly guided exploration for reliable multi-agent autonomy. Code will be released in https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/mace

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM智能体在多智能体系统中存在探索不足的问题，并提出MACE框架通过结构化同伴选择来促进探索，显著提升了协调表现。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统中探索对于可靠自主性至关重要，但当前LLM智能体在相互交互时能否有效探索尚不清楚，且现有研究缺乏对此问题的正式化建模。
AI.method: 将多智能体探索问题形式化为部分可观测随机博弈（POSG）问题，并提出MACE（多智能体上下文探索）框架，通过结构化同伴选择显式促进探索行为。
AI.result: 在上下文多样性和参数多样性设置下，MACE显著改善了探索行为和下游任务性能；理论上证明探索的价值随智能体多样性增加而增加。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体存在根本性的探索局限性，显式引导的探索对于实现可靠的多智能体自主性至关重要。

title: Index SLM Technical Report
summary: We present Index-1.9B, a series of open small language models developed at Bilibili. The series comprises four models: Index-1.9B-Base, a foundation model with 1.9 billion non-embedding parameters pre-trained on 2.8 trillion predominantly Chinese and English tokens; Index-1.9B-Pure, a control variant trained with an identical recipe but with all instruction-like data strictly filtered from the corpus; Index-1.9B-Chat, aligned from the base model with supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization; and Index-1.9B-Character, which augments the chat model with retrieval-augmented generation for few-shot role-playing customization. Pre-training employs a Warmup-Stable-Decay learning-rate schedule in which the concentration of curated data is raised substantially during the decay phase, together with a Norm-Head output layer that stabilizes training under large learning rates. On a suite of standard benchmarks covering examination, reasoning, mathematics, and code, Index-1.9B-Base attains an average score of 64.92, competitive with or exceeding open models of several times its size. We further report controlled studies on model depth, learning-rate magnitude and scheduling, the interaction between learning-rate decay and data quality, and the effect of including instruction data during pre-training, and we document an unexplained surge in benchmark performance midway through the constant-learning-rate phase. All models, together with evaluation code, are released at https://github.com/bilibili/Index-1.9B.

AI.tldr: B站发布了Index-1.9B系列开源小语言模型，包括Base、Pure、Chat和Character四个版本，在基准测试中表现超越数倍于自身规模的模型。
AI.motivation: 开发开源的小型语言模型系列，在有限参数规模下实现与更大模型竞争的性能，并探索预训练过程中的关键影响因素。
AI.method: 采用Warmup-Stable-Decay学习率调度策略，在衰减阶段集中高质量数据；使用Norm-Head输出层稳定大学习率训练；通过SFT和DPO进行对齐；引入RAG实现少样本角色扮演。
AI.result: Index-1.9B-Base在标准基准测试中平均得分64.92，与数倍于自身规模的开源模型竞争或超越。
AI.conclusion: 小模型通过精心设计的训练策略和数据调度可以达到与大模型相当的性能，全部模型已开源。

title: Cross-Subject Modeling for Widefield Calcium Imaging via Atlas-Aligned Spatiotemporal Tokenization
comment: Published at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026. Code available at: https://github.com/ShanechiLab/WiCAT
summary: Large-scale, multi-subject widefield calcium imaging provides unprecedented access to brain-wide cortical dynamics. However, the high dimensionality, complex spatiotemporal structure, and substantial task-irrelevant activity in widefield recordings have largely restricted modeling efforts to single-session analyses, limiting scalability and generalization. While multi-subject pretrained models have been explored for some neural modalities, multi-subject models for widefield calcium imaging have not yet been demonstrated; further, subject-invariant zero-shot behavior decoding remains elusive for multi-subject models across neural modalities more broadly. As a first step toward foundation modeling of widefield data, we introduce WiCAT, a multi-subject model that leverages self-supervised pretraining to both outperform single-session models and enable zero-shot behavior decoding on unseen subjects. WiCAT introduces an atlas-grounded tokenization scheme without session-specific components and learns globally shared spatiotemporal representations. Across multiple widefield datasets, the pretrained model supports lightweight downstream decoding, transfers across subjects, tasks, and datasets, and outperforms baseline models. Notably, the model also achieves robust zero-shot continuous behavior decoding and left-out brain region reconstruction on unseen subjects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WiCAT，一种基于自监督预训练的多主体宽场钙成像基础模型，能够实现零样本行为解码和跨主体泛化。
AI.motivation: 宽场钙成像数据高维、结构复杂且包含大量任务无关活动，现有模型多局限于单会话分析，缺乏可扩展性和泛化能力；多主体预训练模型在宽场钙成像领域尚未被探索。
AI.method: WiCAT采用基于图谱的token化方案，无需会话特定组件，通过自监督预训练学习全局共享的时空表征。
AI.result: 在多个宽场数据集上，WiCAT优于单会话基线模型，支持轻量级下游解码，可跨主体、任务和数据集迁移，并在未见主体上实现鲁棒的零样本连续行为解码和左出脑区重建。
AI.conclusion: WiCAT是首个面向宽场钙成像的多主体基础模型，证明了自监督预训练在神经科学数据跨主体泛化中的有效性。

title: Position: Every Ground Truth is a Human Construction, not an Objective Truth
comment: 13 pages, 1 figure. To be published in Proceedings of the 43 rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea. PMLR 306, 2026
summary: Ground truth datasets play a fundamental role as reference values in the training and evaluation of machine learning models. This position paper argues that ground truths are not neutral objective measurements that are naturally given, but instead that they are constructed by arrangements of humans and technologies. We argue that the ML community will benefit from articulating and discussing these often invisible or unreported choices and acknowledging that reference data sets are contingent, not universal. Focusing on the situated and context-dependent nature of ground truths can improve reliability by enabling a better informed perspective on where, when, and how the datasets, and the models they have shaped, can best be used. We argue for increasing `situated reliability' which includes articulating the limits and strengths of models and their truth claims. Finally, paying more attention to the construction of ground truths can support transparency, accountability, and interdisciplinary work.

AI.tldr: 本文主张"地面真相"数据集并非客观中立的测量结果，而是人机协作构建的产物，ML社区应承认其情境依赖性和局限性，通过明确数据集的使用边界来提升"情境可靠性"。
AI.motivation: 当前ML社区普遍将地面真相数据集视为天然客观的基准，忽视了其构建过程中的人为选择和情境依赖性，这可能导致模型评估的误导和滥用。
AI.method: 采用立场论文（position paper）的形式，通过论证和理论分析，批判性地审视地面真相数据集的本质，提出"情境可靠性"（situated reliability）概念。
AI.result: 指出地面真相是情境依赖的、非普适的；明确其适用范围和局限性有助于提升模型评估的可靠性；关注数据构建过程有助于透明度、可问责性和跨学科合作。
AI.conclusion: ML社区应更主动地讨论地面真相数据集构建中的隐性选择，承认其偶然性和局限性，以此提升模型的可靠评估和负责任使用。

title: Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking
summary: Prompt wrappers often differ only in formatting, yet they can change model scores enough to flip leaderboard conclusions. We study this variance under a token-controlled protocol and introduce two complementary metrics: the Format Sensitivity Index (FSI), the accuracy range induced by wrapper choice, and the Parseability Sensitivity Index (PSI), the corresponding range in answer parseability. Across 140,000 OpenRouter generations spanning 7 QA tasks, 5 wrapper families, and 4 instruct models from 7B to 72B parameters, we find that mean FSI varies by over 30x across models and is largely explained by compliance failures. A fixed-effects regression shows that parseability remains a strong predictor of accuracy even after controlling for task, model, and wrapper. We argue that reporting accuracy without wrapper variance and compliance is statistically fragile, and we give practical recommendations for both benchmarking and structured-output deployments.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了提示词包装器（prompt wrappers）的格式差异对模型评分和排行榜结论的影响，提出了格式敏感性指数（FSI）和可解析性敏感性指数（PSI）两个指标，发现FSI在不同模型间差异超过30倍，且可解析性是准确率的强预测因子。
AI.motivation: 提示词包装器仅格式不同却可能改变模型评分，导致排行榜结论翻转，现有评估方法忽视了这种统计脆弱性。
AI.method: 通过token控制协议，在140,000次OpenRouter生成实验（7个QA任务、5种包装器族、4种指令模型）中，提出FSI和PSI两个指标，并采用固定效应回归分析。
AI.result: FSI均值在不同模型间差异超过30倍，主要归因于合规失败；可解析性是准确率的强预测因子，即使控制了任务、模型和包装器因素。
AI.conclusion: 报告准确率时不考虑包装器方差和合规性在统计上是脆弱的，建议在基准测试和结构化输出部署中采纳实用建议。

title: An Explainable Agentic System for Detection of Conversational Scams with Summary-Based Memory
summary: Following the rapid progress of generative Artificial Intelligence, there is a growing threat posed by conversational scams. These scams often span over multiple weeks or months, gradually build trust and request for money or sensitive information. Existing scam-detection systems mainly focus on isolated messages, which renders them inadequate against this evolving threat. This paper extends single-message phishing detection and presents an explainable agentic system for detecting sophisticated conversational scams. It also introduces ConScamBench-278, an initial public multi-category benchmark for conversational scam detection spanning eight scam types, released to support reproducible evaluation and future expansion. On isolated messages the single-message detector attains 100% phishing recall, while the conversation-level detector identifies all conversational scams in the public LoveFraud02 corpus (83/83) and reaches 97.8% accuracy (95% CI [95.4, 99.0]) on ConScamBench-278. Two user studies (N = 100 and N = 45) further motivate the system: participants report frequently experiencing uncertainty when judging suspicious conversations. In an uncontrolled pre/post comparison, users self-reported trust, self-confidence, and perceived need for AI-based scam detection all increased (p < 0.001, Wilcoxon signed-rank). The system also receives a System Usability Scale score of 74.7 (95% CI [72.5, 76.9]), above the established usability benchmark.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可解释的智能体系统用于检测复杂的对话式诈骗，并发布ConScamBench-278基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有诈骗检测系统主要聚焦于单条消息，无法有效应对跨越多周/月的对话式诈骗，需要更高级的检测方法。
AI.method: 构建可解释的智能体系统，结合单消息检测器和对话级检测器，在ConScamBench-278和LoveFraud02数据集上评估，并通过用户研究验证系统有效性。
AI.result: 单消息检测器在钓鱼检测上召回率100%；对话级检测器在LoveFraud02上识别全部83个诈骗案例，在ConScamBench-278上准确率97.8%；系统可用性评分74.7。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能有效检测复杂对话式诈骗，用户信任度和自我信心在使用后显著提升，具有实际应用价值。

title: RouteRec: Strict Evaluation of Recommender-Agent Selection and Aggregation
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at AgentSearch 2026 (The First Workshop on Indexing, Retrieval, and Ranking of AI Agents), co-located with SIGIR 2026
summary: Recommender systems increasingly face a choice among heterogeneous agents -- collaborative filters, sequential models, content-based retrievers, and LLM-based rerankers -- yet no single agent is uniformly best. We study this choice as task-aware agent ranking under cost constraints using RouteRec, a framework that compares request-level hard selection with item-level learned aggregation over four traditional recommender agents and one LLM reranker agent. On MovieLens-1M, the full quality oracle has substantial headroom (HR@10 = 0.584), confirming that useful cross-agent signal exists. Under a leakage-free 5-fold out-of-fold protocol, however, hard selection remains below BM25 (0.223 vs. 0.254), and selective LLM escalation does not improve it. The same protocol yields a different outcome for learned aggregation: its cheap-only variant matches BM25 in HR and has a higher NDCG point estimate (0.123 vs. 0.114), while gated all-agent aggregation reaches HR@10 = 0.295 with 70.2\% LLM calls. The resulting lesson is not that routing is solved, but that request-level selection of one complete agent list is too coarse for this sparse fixed-candidate setting; item-level aggregation is the more promising action space.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在推荐系统中，面对多种异构智能体（包括传统推荐模型和LLM重排序器）时，如何在成本约束下进行任务感知的智能体路由。实验表明，请求级的硬选择效果有限，而项目级的可学习聚合更有效，能在控制LLM调用成本的同时提升推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统面临多种异构智能体（协同过滤、序列模型、基于内容的检索器、LLM重排序器）的选择问题，但没有任何单一智能体在所有场景下表现最优，因此需要研究如何在成本约束下智能地路由请求。
AI.method: 提出RouteRec框架，比较请求级硬选择与项目级可学习聚合两种路由策略，涉及四种传统推荐智能体和一种LLM重排序器。在MovieLens-1M数据集上采用无泄漏的5折交叉验证协议进行评估。
AI.result: 完整质量oracle的HR@10=0.584，表明存在跨智能体的有用信号。但硬选择仍低于BM25（0.223 vs 0.254）。可学习聚合的廉价变体在HR上与BM25持平，NDCG略高（0.123 vs 0.114）；门控全智能体聚合达到HR@10=0.295，但需要70.2%的LLM调用。
AI.conclusion: 请求级选择单个完整智能体列表对于稀疏固定候选推荐场景过于粗糙，项目级聚合是更有前景的行动空间。

title: RSLoRA: Training-free Rank Allocation for LoRA via Representational Sensitivity Probing
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a cornerstone of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT); however, the conventional practice of uniform rank assignment ignores the functional heterogeneity of neural layers. Existing rank allocation methods typically struggle with a trade-off between computational intensity and heuristic simplicity: training-based methods suffer from prohibitive overhead, while pre-allocation methods fail to capture the dynamic task-specific representation manifold. In this paper, we propose RSLoRA (Representational Sensitivity LoRA), a training-free and gradient-free rank allocator driven by activation-space geometry. We identify a "sensitivity regime shift" across layers, observing that static weight analysis and local gradients are insufficient to reflect how updates reshape a model's internal representations. To address this, RSLoRA introduces a virtual representational probing mechanism. By simulating adaptation through structured low-rank noise and measuring the resulting manifold displacement by using Effective Rank and Frechet Distance, we identify high-sensitivity modules that require higher rank capacity. Our framework effectively bridges the gap between expert-crafted heuristics and actual representational impact. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that RSLoRA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art allocators (e.g., AdaLoRA, GoRA) across mainstream benchmarks. By eliminating the need for iterative training-time adjustments and backward gradients, RSLoRA provides a highly efficient, robust, and representation-aware solution for large-scale model adaptation.

AI.tldr: 提出RSLoRA，一种无需训练和梯度的秩分配方法，通过激活空间几何和虚拟表征探测机制，在参数高效微调中实现优于现有方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统LoRA固定秩分配忽略了神经层的功能异质性，现有秩分配方法在计算开销和启发式简单性之间存在权衡，缺乏捕获动态任务特定表征流形的能力。
AI.method: RSLoRA引入虚拟表征探测机制，通过结构化低秩噪声模拟适应，利用有效秩和弗雷歇距离测量流形位移，从而识别需要高秩容量的高敏感模块。
AI.result: 在主流基准测试中，RSLoRA持续优于AdaLoRA、GoRA等最先进的分配器。
AI.conclusion: RSLoRA提供了一种高效、鲁棒且具有表征感知能力的大规模模型适应方案，无需迭代训练调整和反向梯度。

title: AuditWeave: A Tamper-Evident, Auditor-Navigable Evidence Layer for AI-Assisted and Data-Transformation Workflows
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, open-source implementation at pypi.org/project/auditweave
summary: AI systems are increasingly used to assist consequential decisions in regulated domains such as auditing, finance, and healthcare. This creates a recurring obligation: an organization must be able to reconstruct, after the fact, which evidence informed a given conclusion, and to show that the record of that reasoning was not altered. Existing tools address related but distinct problems - model observability, drift monitoring, governance reporting - and are built for the machine-learning engineer operating a system, not the reviewer who must trace one specific conclusion back to its supporting evidence. We present AuditWeave, a lightweight Python library, with no runtime dependencies, that records the steps of AI-assisted and data-transformation workflows into a single append-only, hash-chained ledger. A small, system-agnostic event vocabulary spans both retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines and tabular/lakehouse transformations, so a conclusion that draws on both can be traced end-to-end through one record. Within a sealed ledger, any modification, reordering, insertion, or deletion of events is detectable through chain verification. We describe the design and evaluate recording overhead, scalability, and tamper-detection correctness on the reference implementation. The integrity guarantees cost tens of microseconds per event, and, as the hash-chain construction implies, verification flagged every injected mutation across four mutation classes over 2,000 randomized trials.

AI.tldr: 审计追踪库，用哈希链记录AI辅助决策过程，支持RAG和表格数据流程，实现防篡改可追溯。
AI.motivation: 现有工具面向ML工程师而非审核者，无法端到端追溯单个结论的证据来源，缺乏轻量级防篡改记录方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级Python库AuditWeave，采用只追加哈希链账本记录事件，定义系统无关事件词汇覆盖RAG和表格转换流程，通过链式验证检测篡改。
AI.result: 每个事件记录开销仅几十微秒；在2000次随机试验中，四种篡改类别的所有注入突变均被验证识别。
AI.conclusion: AuditWeave实现了轻量、高效、可验证的AI辅助决策审计追踪，满足合规场景的防篡改需求。

title: Faithful, Not Corrective: Message-Format Effects in Multi-Hop Agent Relays Are Tier-Dependent
summary: When LLM agents hand off information to one another, does the message format matter? Two literatures disagree: format-optimization work reports that structured messages cut cost without hurting accuracy, while format-restriction work finds that imposing structure degrades generation -- and neither measures what happens when a message traverses multiple hops, where copy fidelity, not one-shot generation, dominates. We introduce a controlled relay testbed: briefs of twelve programmatically generated atomic facts are re-encoded hop-by-hop in five formats (free NL, precision-instructed NL, JSON, triples, key-value) over six hops, scored by a fixed strong grader against programmatic ground truth, across two relay-capability tiers, a cognitive-load condition, and a paired-fork error injection. We find that message-format effects are tier-dependent. (i) Under faithful-relay instructions a strong relay is nearly lossless -- the documented "telephone-game" collapse does not occur -- and adding per-hop cognitive load leaves format-level fidelity unchanged (within +/-1.8 points) while raising generation cost by 24-53%. (ii) Under a weak (1.5B) relay the across-format spread of six-hop recall grows by a factor of 8.7 (from 2.3 to 20.5 points), driven by two opposing mechanisms -- an encoding toll paid by the rigid formats and drift resistance specific to the fixed-key JSON schema -- that flip the format ranking in transit. (iii) In a paired-fork injection, an injected wrong value, once present, persists to the final hop in 83-100% of chains in every format, closely matching each format's retention of the true value, with no detectable collateral damage to neighboring facts. Structure buys a faithful, error-localizing channel -- not an error-correcting code -- and format choice should follow the weakest relay in the pipeline.

AI.tldr: 研究了LLM代理间信息传递时，消息格式（自由文本、JSON、三元组等）对多跳中继忠实度的影响。发现格式效果取决于中继能力：强中继几乎无损，弱中继下格式间召回率差异扩大8.7倍；错误一旦注入会持续存在。结构化格式提供忠实、错误局部化的通道，而非纠错码。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对消息格式的看法存在矛盾——格式优化工作认为结构化消息降低成本且不损失精度，格式限制工作认为施加结构会降低生成质量。而且两者都未测量多跳场景下的复制忠实度（而非单次生成）。
AI.method: 构建受控中继测试平台：12个原子事实以5种格式（自由NL、精度指导NL、JSON、三元组、键值对）进行6跳重编码，由固定强评分器对照程序化真实值评分，包含两种中继能力层级、认知负载条件和配对分叉错误注入。
AI.result: (1) 强中继下几乎无损，认知负载只增加成本(24-53%)不影响忠实度。(2) 弱中继下格式间6跳召回率差距扩大8.7倍(从2.3到20.5个百分点)，JSON格式的固定键表现出独特优势。(3) 错误注入后83-100%的链中错误持续存在，与真实值保留率高度一致，无附带损害。
AI.conclusion: 结构化格式提供的是忠实、错误局部化的通道，而非纠错码。格式选择应跟随流水线中最弱的中继环节。

title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for C-V2X RAT Selection
summary: Vehicles are increasingly equipped with advanced V2X communication capabilities. While early V2X apps utilized services such as Cooperative Awareness Messages, recent developments have allowed more advanced applications including cooperative driving, shared perception, and sensor-sharing services. The broader mix of applications leads to heterogeneous requirements for latency and reliability. At the same time multiple communication technologies for V2X are available with pros and cons. Hybrid V2X communication can exploit the distinct advantages at the right moment to fulfill the requirements of the applications. This work studies the decision problem between cellular Uu link, NR-V2X PC5 sidelink, and the simultaneous use of both channels. We address this problem by using the multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithm MAPPO and compare it to five baselines consisting of a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) approach, a static decision tree approach and static channel selection strategies. The methods are evaluated in an urban scenario and with a set of selected communication use cases. The evaluation results show that when compared to the DRL approach, the on-time delivery ratio improves from 0.508 to 0.535 in a single-controlled-vehicle setting and from 0.548 to 0.567 when all vehicles follow the learned policy and reduces the training time by half. The gains result mainly from the advanced applications scenarios, as opposed to scenarios involving exclusively CAM messaging. This indicates future applications will benefit from such adaptive communication strategies and that multi-agent modelling is useful for addressing the underlying decision problem.

AI.tldr: 本文利用多智能体强化学习（MAPPO）解决混合V2X通信中不同链路（Uu、PC5及同时使用）的选择决策问题，相比DRL方法提升了传输及时率并缩短了训练时间。
AI.motivation: 随着V2X应用多样化（如协同驾驶、共享感知），不同应用对延迟和可靠性有异构需求，而单一通信技术难以同时满足，因此需要混合V2X通信的智能决策方案。
AI.method: 采用多智能体强化学习算法MAPPO，在蜂窝Uu链路、NR-V2X PC5侧链及双链路同时使用之间进行动态决策，并与DRL、静态决策树及静态信道选择策略进行对比。
AI.result: MAPPO方法在单一受控车辆场景下将及时交付率从0.508提升至0.535，在所有车辆均采用该策略时从0.548提升至0.567，训练时间减半。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体强化学习适用于混合V2X通信决策问题，且高级应用场景（非CAM消息）收益更显著，表明未来应用将受益于自适应通信策略。

title: Global Merger-Arbitrage Forecasting with Language Models
summary: We present a language-model forecasting system for merger arbitrage, a specialized high-stakes financial setting in which the task is to predict the outcome of announced M\&A deals. Unlike prior work on judgmental forecasting with LLMs, which has focused on broad mixed-topic benchmarks and short context such as news snippets, we study a setting that requires long-context reasoning over hundreds of pages of technical documents. Our system combines expert-guided context engineering with finetuning on hindsight-guided reasoning traces derived from historical deals. Given an announced deal, it outputs a probability distribution over three mutually exclusive outcomes: closing at announced terms, a higher bid, or deal termination. On an out-of-sample set of more than 400 large deals spanning 42 countries, our finetuned system achieves the best performance of any method we evaluate, reducing class-balanced Brier score to 0.151. This is 24\% below calibrated market-implied probabilities, 19\% below XGBoost, and 25-42\% below frontier language models. These results, together with ablation studies, show that LLM-based forecasting can succeed in specialized, long-context financial workflows, with hindsight-based supervision and expert-designed context playing a critical role.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个用于并购套利预测的语言模型预测系统，通过专家引导的上下文工程和基于后见之明推理轨迹的微调，在超过400笔跨国大型交易中实现了最优预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM预测工作聚焦于多样化的混合主题基准和短文本（如新闻摘要），缺乏对需要长文本推理的专业金融场景（如并购套利）的研究。
AI.method: 结合专家引导的上下文工程与后见之明推理轨迹微调，将数百页技术文档作为输入，输出三种互斥结果的概率分布（按宣布条款完成、更高出价、交易终止）。
AI.result: 在42个国家400多笔大型交易上，微调系统实现了0.151的类别平衡Brier分数，比市场隐含概率低24%，比XGBoost低19%，比前沿语言模型低25-42%。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的预测可以在专业的长文本金融工作流中成功，后见之明监督和专家设计的上下文起着关键作用。

title: ReflectWorld-MM: An Entity-Oriented Multi-Media Memory System for Open-Ended Video Streams
summary: Building assistants that can continually watch the world, remember what they see, and reason over their accumulated experience is a long-standing goal, and recently multimodal agents equipped with long-term memory over video streams have attracted increasing interest. Unfortunately, existing systems either keep their memory inside the model context or in a flat feature store, and organize it around frames rather than around the persistent entities a stream is really about, which confines them to bounded videos and weakens their ability to track who and what reappears over time. In this paper, we propose ReflectWorld-MM, an entity-oriented multi-media memory system for open-ended video streams. It consists of three parts. The first is a perception front-end that turns a streaming video into entity-resolved observations under a bounded short-term memory. The second is a hierarchical long-term memory, grounded in human memory theory, that couples a multi-scale episodic memory, an evolving entity-centric semantic memory, and a procedural memory. The third is a complete realization, built for real-world operation, that ingests arbitrary streams and plugs into off-the-shelf assistants. Across six long-video and lifelong-memory benchmarks, ReflectWorld-MM achieves the best accuracy on all six, outperforming strong memory agents and a frontier model.

AI.tldr: 提出实体导向的多媒体记忆系统ReflectWorld-MM，用于开放视频流，通过分层记忆架构实现持续感知、记忆和推理，在6个基准测试中均取得最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有系统将记忆局限在模型上下文或平面特征存储中，以帧为单位组织而非持续实体，限制了跟踪跨时间重复出现的人/物的能力。
AI.method: 三部分构成：1）感知前端将视频流转化为实体解析的观测；2）基于人类记忆理论的分层长期记忆（多尺度情节记忆、实体中心语义记忆、程序记忆）；3）完整实现，可接入任意流和现成助手。
AI.result: 在6个长视频和终身记忆基准测试中全部取得最佳准确率，超越强记忆智能体和前沿模型。
AI.conclusion: 实体导向的分层记忆架构能有效支持开放视频流中的持续感知与推理，优于现有基于帧或上下文的方法。

title: Ablation, Statistical Inference, and Validation for KV-Cache Compression
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures, minimum number of citations
summary: This study systematically compares Turbo-Quant and SpectralQuant KV-cache compression, evaluating non-dominated schemes, including WHT rotation with Beta Lloyd-Max and QJL, through a statistical validation methodology that separates systematic codec differences from implementation variance. Key findings reveal that while eigenbasis-based methods fail on heavy-tailed data due to covariance instability, they excel in structured regimes, with the effective semantic dimension ($d_{eff}$) adapting to calibration budgets rather than true data rank. (this is an abstract of the abstract thank you )

AI.tldr: 系统比较了Turbo-Quant和SpectralQuant两种KV-cache压缩方法，通过统计验证方法分离了编解码器差异与实现方差，发现基于特征基的方法在重尾数据上因协方差不稳定而失败，但在结构化数据中表现优异，且有效语义维度(d_eff)随校准预算变化而非真实数据秩。
AI.motivation: 现有KV-cache压缩方法缺乏系统性的统计比较，需要区分编解码器本身差异与工程实现差异，以揭示不同方法的真实性能。
AI.method: 采用统计验证方法论，对Turbo-Quant和SpectralQuant进行系统比较，评估非支配方案（包括WHT旋转+Beta Lloyd-Max和QJL），分离系统编解码差异与实现方差。
AI.result: 基于特征基的方法在重尾数据上因协方差不稳定而失败，但在结构化数据中表现优异；有效语义维度(d_eff)适应校准预算而非真实数据秩。
AI.conclusion: 不同KV-cache压缩方法的性能高度依赖于数据分布特性，选择方法需考虑数据结构和校准预算等因素。

title: Boltzmann MapReduce: A Partition-Function Reduce for Forkable Sandboxes
summary: To leading order under local asymptotic normality (LAN), the confidence density a worker emits over a chunk of size $n$ is a Gibbs--Boltzmann measure $\exp\{-βE(θ)\}$ whose inverse temperature is the sample size, $β=n$. Three consequences are exact in the Gaussian/linear case and first-order otherwise: disjoint chunks carry independent Boltzmann factors, so the MapReduce \emph{reduce}, read literally, is a partition function $Z=\int\prod_k h_k\,dθ$ whose mode is precision-weighted (inverse-variance) pooling; frequentist consistency is the zero-temperature limit $T=1/n\to0$

AI.tldr: 该论文在局部渐近正态性（LAN）下，证明工作者发出的置信密度是Gibbs-Boltzmann测度，逆温度等于样本量n，并推导出MapReduce的reduce操作等价于配分函数，其众数是精度加权池化，频率学派一致性对应零温极限。
AI.motivation: 将统计推断中的置信密度与统计力学中的玻尔兹曼分布联系起来，为分布式统计推断（如MapReduce框架）提供严格的数学基础。
AI.method: 基于局部渐近正态性（LAN）理论，推导置信密度的Gibbs-Boltzmann形式，并分析其在高斯/线性情形下的精确性质及一般情形下的一阶近似。
AI.result: 1) 置信密度为Gibbs-Boltzmann测度，逆温度β=n；2) 不相交数据块的玻尔兹曼因子独立，MapReduce的reduce对应配分函数；3) 众数为精度加权池化；4) 频率学派一致性对应零温极限T=1/n→0。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了统计推断与统计力学之间的形式对应关系，为分布式推断提供了理论支撑，并在高斯/线性情形下精确成立。

title: Forgetting Our Way to Shared Meaning: Effects of Forgetting on Conceptual Alignment in a Non-Partnership Coordination Game
summary: Shared meaning in language requires people to learn and agree on categories. We ask how characteristics of agents' memories change the emergence and evolution of shared meaning. Without a coordination game, models of conceptual semantics cannot explain how shared meaning emerges and changes in groups of people; however, existing games assume that players share payoffs in a partnership setting. We model conceptual alignment as a non-partnership game and illustrate differences in actual and perceived conceptual convergence from counterfactual simulations using agents with varying levels of adaptiveness and memory degradation. We found that adaptive players achieved actual convergence faster and had closer final conceptual regions than non-adaptive players, while non-adaptive players perceived convergence earlier. Weighing novel information less over time resulted in more stable agreements than fixing the weight of novel information. Memory features are critical to the emergence and evolution of actual and perceived convergence.

AI.tldr: 研究记忆特征如何影响语言中共享意义（概念对齐）的产生与演化，通过非合作博弈模拟发现：自适应玩家实际收敛更快，非自适应玩家感知收敛更早，且随时间降低新信息权重比固定权重更稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有概念语义模型通过合作博弈解释共享意义的产生，但无法解释非合作场景下共享意义如何出现和变化，因此需要研究非合作博弈中的概念对齐过程。
AI.method: 构建非合作博弈模型，通过反事实模拟比较不同适应性水平和记忆衰减程度的智能体在概念对齐中的表现。
AI.result: 自适应玩家实际收敛更快且最终概念区域更接近；非自适应玩家感知收敛更早；随时间降低新信息权重比固定权重更有利于稳定协议。
AI.conclusion: 记忆特征是影响共享意义实际收敛和感知收敛的关键因素。

title: Faithful by Design: Evaluating and Improving LLM-Generated Clinical Trial Summaries for Multi-Stakeholder Audiences
summary: Large language models are increasingly used to summarize clinical trial results for healthcare providers, patients, and payers, but their tendency to hallucinate poses significant risks in this high-stakes context. This study introduces a benchmark evaluation framework for measuring the faithfulness of LLM-generated clinical trial summaries across three stakeholder audiences. The framework consists of 200 stratified trials drawn from the Aggregate Analysis of ClinicalTrials.gov database, evaluated using audience-specific prompt templates and a six-dimension faithfulness annotation schema. Baseline measurements were established for GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 2.5 Flash across 1,800 generated summaries scored using a cross-encoder natural language inference (NLI) model. Unsupported Claims was identified as the dominant failure mode across all three models, with a mean annotation score of 1.55 out of three. A knowledge-graph-augmented retrieval system was developed and evaluated against the baseline, producing statistically significant improvements in NLI-based faithfulness scores (entailment +0.0125, faithfulness +0.0130, p < 0.0001). Improvement pathways were model-dependent, with GPT-4o improving primarily through contradiction reduction while Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 2.5 Flash improved through increased entailment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种评估LLM生成临床试验摘要忠实度的基准框架，发现"无根据主张"是主要失败模式，并验证了知识图谱增强检索系统能显著提升忠实度。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在临床试验摘要生成中容易出现幻觉，在高风险医疗场景下可能造成严重危害，现有缺乏系统性的忠实度评估方法。
AI.method: 构建了包含200个分层试验的基准框架，使用三种LLM（GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash）生成1800份摘要，采用六维度忠实度标注方案和交叉编码器NLI模型评分，并开发知识图谱增强检索系统进行对比。
AI.result: "无根据主张"是主要失败模式（平均得分1.55/3）；知识图谱增强检索系统带来统计显著的忠实度提升（蕴涵+0.0125，忠实度+0.0130，p<0.0001）；不同模型改进路径不同。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱增强检索能有效提升LLM生成临床试验摘要的忠实度，但改进机制因模型而异，需针对性优化。

title: Knowledge-Constrained Shape Optimization with a Mixture-of-Experts Neural Operator for High-Confidence Design
summary: Engineering shape optimization faces challenges in both expert-dependent problem setup and surrogate-model reliability. In practical aerodynamic design, optimization settings such as editable regions, deformation ranges, and design-preservation constraints are typically specified manually by experienced engineers, while surrogate-based optimization may become unreliable for heterogeneous geometry databases and out-of-distribution designs. To address these challenges, we propose a knowledge-constrained shape-optimization framework that translates knowledge-based constraints and user intent into quantifiable parameters of DFFD-based deformation operators, enabling engineering-aware and controllable constrained optimization. We further develop a Mixture-of-Experts Neural Operator (MoE-NO) to improve drag prediction and trend consistency over heterogeneous aerodynamic datasets. Based on the MoE-NO encoder and Mahalanobis distance, an uncertainty-estimation strategy is introduced to detect out-of-distribution geometries and selectively trigger physics-solver feedback for local sample enrichment. Experiments on in-house MPV, SUV, and Sedan datasets show that MoE-NO achieves a test-set MAPE of $1.16\%$ and a trend-prediction accuracy of $94.34\%$, outperforming the best baseline results of $1.52\%$ and $90.34\%$, respectively. Vehicle shape-optimization experiments further yield CFD-validated drag coefficient reductions of approximately $4\%$ to $10\%$.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个知识约束的形状优化框架，结合MoE神经算子和不确定性估计，在汽车空气动力学优化中实现了约4%-10%的阻力系数降低。
AI.motivation: 工程形状优化面临专家依赖性强（人工设置优化参数）和代理模型不可靠（异构几何数据库和分布外设计）两大挑战。
AI.method: 1) 知识约束形状优化框架：将知识和用户意图转化为DFFD变形算子的可量化参数；2) MoE-NO（混合专家神经算子）：提升异构空气动力学数据集上的阻力预测和趋势一致性；3) 基于MoE-NO编码器和马氏距离的不确定性估计策略，检测分布外几何并触发物理求解器反馈进行局部样本丰富。
AI.result: 在MPV、SUV、Sedan数据集上，MoE-NO测试集MAPE为1.16%，趋势预测准确率94.34%，优于基线（1.52%/90.34%）。形状优化实验获得CFD验证的阻力系数降低约4%-10%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了异构数据和不稳定代理模型问题，实现了工程感知的可控约束优化，显著提升了汽车空气动力学优化效果。

title: SciML in the Wild: A Diagnostic Study of When Structural Priors Help and When They Hurt
summary: Scientific Machine Learning (SciML) methods such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), and Universal Differential Equations (UDEs) are most effective when structural priors reflect reliable governing dynamics. We ask what happens when this assumption is violated. Using macroeconomic forecasting as a stress-test domain, we evaluate five model families, ARIMA, LSTM, NODE, PINN, and UDE, across 23 countries using sparse annual data, multiple temporal splits, and five random seeds. Our results show that none of the evaluated models achieve consistently strong forecasting performance, highlighting the difficulty of low-frequency macroeconomic prediction. However, a clear relative hierarchy emerges: less-constrained models, particularly ARIMA and NODE, consistently outperform more-constrained heuristic-prior models such as PINN and UDE. Rather than treating this as a rejection of SciML, we interpret it as a diagnostic result: structural priors can act as misregularizers when they do not match the data-generating process. We identify failure modes including prior misalignment, regime shifts, structural breaks, and optimization instability, and argue that SciML practitioners should test whether structure helps before assuming that more structure is beneficial.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在宏观经济预测这一低频率、高噪声场景下，科学机器学习（SciML）方法（如NODE、PINN、UDE）的结构先验失效问题。结果表明，当先验与数据生成过程不匹配时，无约束模型（ARIMA、NODE）反而优于有约束模型（PINN、UDE），结构先验可能成为"错误正则化器"。
AI.motivation: 现有SciML方法假设结构先验能反映可靠的控制动力学，但这一假设在复杂、低频率的宏观经济数据中可能不成立。作者想检验当结构先验被违反时会发生什么。
AI.method: 选取5种模型（ARIMA、LSTM、NODE、PINN、UDE），基于23个国家的稀疏年度数据，使用多个时间划分和5个随机种子进行宏观经济预测实验。
AI.result: 没有模型能持续取得强预测性能；但存在清晰的相对排序：较少约束的模型（ARIMA、NODE）持续优于更多约束的启发式先验模型（PINN、UDE）。
AI.conclusion: 结构先验在数据不匹配时可能成为"错误正则化器"，SciML实践者应先测试结构是否有帮助，而非默认更多结构更好。

title: Interpreting Latent CoT Reasoning as Dynamical Systems
summary: Recent latent reasoning methods, such as CODI and COCONUT, face a fundamental interpretability problem: they maintain multiple superimposed candidate traces in the hidden space at each step, unlike explicit- CoT, which follows a single transparent reasoning trace. Existing mechanistic methods show compression, shortcuts, and superposition without explaining how reasoning evolves across latent steps. To address this gap, we model latent token sequences as trajectories in representation space and apply dynamical systems analysis to characterize the evolution of reasoning. Using quantitative measures, such as step-to-step change, direction consistency, and Lyapunov sensitivity, alongside qualitative projections, such as UMAP and DMD/PHATE, we show that latent CoT exhibits structured, non-random dynamics with two distinct stability classes. CODI behaves as a stable attractor, while COCONUT behaves as an unstable expanding system, and SIM-CoT supervision tightens both behaviors without changing the underlying dynamics. This framework advances the interpretability of latent CoT reasoning dynamics and provides actionable insights for improving latent reasoning performance. Code1 and Project page2 available online.

AI.tldr: 本文通过动力系统分析揭示了隐式思维链（latent CoT）推理的结构化动态：CODI表现为稳定吸引子，COCONUT为不稳定扩张系统，并提出了可解释性分析框架。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式推理方法（如CODI、COCONUT）在隐空间维护多条叠加候选轨迹，缺乏可解释性，难以理解推理如何在隐层步骤中演化。
AI.method: 将隐式token序列建模为表示空间中的轨迹，应用动力系统分析（步间变化、方向一致性、Lyapunov敏感性等定量指标），结合UMAP和DMD/PHATE等定性投影方法。
AI.result: 隐式CoT展现出结构化、非随机的动态，存在两类稳定性：CODI为稳定吸引子，COCONUT为不稳定扩张系统；SIM-CoT监督收紧两类行为但不改变底层动力学。
AI.conclusion: 该框架推进了隐式CoT推理动态的可解释性，并为改进隐式推理性能提供了可行见解。

title: Closed-Loop Control with Rule-Aligned Small Language Models and Multi-Agent Self-Correction
summary: A key step toward autonomous industrial operation is the ability to create and reconfigure control policies from natural-language requirement specifications, with minimal or no manual redesign. In this setting, policy generation by AI agents can be a credible path when paired with a plant-aware validator (e.g., a digital twin) that can check generated candidate actions before execution. However, practical deployment is constrained by inference latency and compute footprint: large cloud-based models are often too slow, opaque, or data-sensitive for edge closed-loop use. This work investigates whether a compact Small Language Model (SLM) can be retrained for control reasoning and embedded in a validator-guided correction loop. We use a Qwen2.5-1.5B model aligned via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), combined with (i) an action agent, (ii) a symbolic/digital-twin-style validation layer, and (iii) a reprompting agent that iteratively steers outputs toward valid actions. In randomized thermal-control simulations (30 experiments with 500 steps each), the framework achieves 91.5% average action-alignment accuracy (86.3%--100% across cases) at 3.84\,s mean inference latency. Under symbolic re-mapping, it maintains a 95% in-range rate, indicating robust physical regulation despite reduced token-level agreement. These results support SLM+validator architectures as a practical path toward reconfigurable autonomous control at the edge.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了使用小型语言模型（SLM）结合验证器纠正循环，实现从自然语言需求规范生成控制策略的自主工业控制方案。
AI.motivation: 实现自主工业操作需要从自然语言需求中创建和重构控制策略，但大型云模型存在延迟高、不透明、数据敏感等问题，不适合边缘闭环控制场景。
AI.method: 采用Qwen2.5-1.5B模型，通过GRPO对齐，结合动作代理、符号/数字孪生风格验证层和重新提示代理，迭代地将输出导向有效动作。
AI.result: 在随机热控制仿真中，平均动作对齐准确率91.5%，平均推理延迟3.84秒；符号重映射下保持95%的范围内率。
AI.conclusion: SLM+验证器架构是实现边缘端可重构自主控制的实用路径。

title: Workload-Driven Optimization for On-Device Real-Time Subtitle Translation
summary:
This report studies on-device English-to-Traditional-Chinese subtitle translation for Taiwan under short inputs, short outputs, batch-size-one inference, low latency, and privacy constraints. These conditions limit the value of optimizations designed for long-context or high-throughput language-model serving.
  Starting from LMT-60-0.6B, preliminary profiling suggests that vocabulary projection becomes a more important decode-time cost after GGUF quantization reduces the relative cost of Transformer blocks. We replace the original 151k-token vocabulary with a 64k-token subtitle-domain tokenizer, migrate the embedding space, and adapt the model through embedding calibration followed by full supervised fine-tuning.
  On a fixed 500-example subset of the OpenSubtitles2024 test set, the LocalSubs achieves a 59.2% tie-excluded win rate against Google Translate under GPT-4o pairwise judging. Performance is strongest on short cues and declines as cue length increases. Preliminary Apple M2 Metal measurements on a 64k-vocabulary model show a 1.63$\times$ speedup over a 151k-vocabulary profiling baseline. The raw benchmark configuration is incomplete, so the latency result is treated as preliminary.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LocalSubs，针对台湾场景的离线英译中字幕翻译系统，通过将词汇表从151k压缩至64k并微调，在短输入场景下达到59.2%胜率，并实现1.63倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型优化方案多针对长上下文或高吞吐场景，在短输入、低延迟、隐私保护等设备端字幕翻译约束下效果有限。
AI.method: 基于LMT-60-0.6B模型，替换原始151k词汇表为64k字幕领域分词器，通过嵌入校准和全监督微调适配模型，并采用GGUF量化。
AI.result: 在OpenSubtitles2024测试集上，LocalSubs对Google Translate取得59.2%胜率；Apple M2上64k词汇表模型相比151k基线加速1.63倍。
AI.conclusion: 针对设备端短输入字幕翻译任务，减小词汇表并领域适配能有效提升翻译质量和推理速度，但长输入场景下性能仍有待改进。

title: Low-Power License Plate Detection and Recognition on a RISC-V Multi-Core MCU-Based Vision System
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. This paper has been accepted for publication in the IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS). Copyright 2021 IEEE
summary: In this paper, we present the first (to the best of our knowledge) demonstration of a low-power MCU-based edge device for Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR). The design leverages on a 9-core RISC-V processor, GAP8, coupled with a QVGA ultra-low-power greyscale imager. The proposed visual processing pipeline uses a multi-model inference approach based on SSDlite-MobilenetV2 for license plate detection and LPRNet for optical character recognition, reaching a 38.9% mAP score for the first task and a recognition rate of >99.13% for the latter on public datasets. On real-world data, the pipeline recognizes registration numbers when the size of LP crops is as small as 30x5 pixels. Thanks to the applied compression and optimization strategies, the multi-model inference (687 MMAC) achieves a throughput of 1.09 FPS at a power cost of 117 mW when running on GAP8. Our solution is the first MCU-class device embedding such a level of network complexity, resulting to be 73x more energy-efficient w.r.t. precedent mobile-class ALPR system featuring a Raspberry Pi3. The proposed design does not resort to any hardwired acceleration engines, thus retaining full flexibility for future algorithmic improvements.

AI.tldr: 本文首次在低功耗MCU边缘设备（基于9核RISC-V处理器GAP8）上实现了自动车牌识别（ALPR），采用SSDlite-MobilenetV2检测+LPRNet识别的多模型推理流程，在117mW功耗下达到1.09 FPS，相比树莓派3能效提升73倍。
AI.motivation: 探索在超低功耗MCU级设备上实现复杂深度学习模型推理的可能性，推动边缘AI在资源受限场景下的应用。
AI.method: 使用9核RISC-V处理器GAP8搭配QVGA灰度图像传感器，采用SSDlite-MobilenetV2进行车牌检测、LPRNet进行字符识别，并应用压缩和优化策略实现多模型推理。
AI.result: 车牌检测mAP达38.9%，字符识别率>99.13%，在30x5像素极小车牌上仍可识别；吞吐量1.09 FPS，功耗仅117 mW，能效比树莓派3高73倍。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明MCU级设备可承载如此复杂的网络推理，且不依赖硬线加速引擎，具有完全灵活性，为未来算法改进留出空间。

title: MawForge: Memory-Bounded Expert Materialization for Local Mixture-of-Experts Inference
summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models separate total parameter count from per-token active computation, but local inference systems often still require the full model, key-value cache, runtime buffers, and operatingsystem headroom to fit in fast memory. MawForge tests a different systems hypothesis: local MoE serving can be made practical on constrained unified-memory machines by storing the full model on disk, keeping common tensors resident, and materializing routed expert tensors into a bounded execution cache on demand. The central finding is that MawForge is effective as a bounded execution mechanism and measurement substrate for local MoE inference, but not as a cache-maximization policy. Performance depends on balancing expert reuse against resident footprint, KV-cache size, quantization, route locality, and macOS memory pressure.

AI.tldr: MawForge是一种针对本地MoE推理的系统，通过将完整模型存储在磁盘上，仅将常用张量保留在内存中，并按需将路由专家张物化到有限执行缓存中，从而在统一内存机器上实现实用化的本地MoE服务。
AI.motivation: 解决稀疏MoE语言模型在本地推理系统中需要完整模型、KV缓存、运行时缓冲区等全部放入快速内存的问题，探索在内存受限的统一内存机器上实现本地MoE服务的可行性。
AI.method: 提出MawForge系统，将完整模型存储在磁盘上，保持常用张量常驻内存，按需将路由专家张物化到有限执行缓存中。
AI.result: MawForge作为有限执行机制和测量基座是有效的，但作为缓存最大化策略效果不佳；性能取决于专家重用与常驻内存占用、KV缓存大小、量化、路由局部性和macOS内存压力之间的平衡。
AI.conclusion: MawForge在统一内存机器上实现了实用的本地MoE推理，但作为缓存策略仍有局限性，需要进一步优化性能平衡。

title: YUKTI: From Natural-Language Situations to Robust, Verifiable Decisions An Uncertainty-Typed Proposition IR, Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers, and a Regret Certificate
summary: Language models turn a worded situation into a numeric plan, and the dominant pipelines (NL4Opt, OptiMUS, ORLM, OR-LLM-Agent) commit to a single objective and point-valued coefficients, then solve once. For decisions that allocate real budget, effort, or clinical attention, that confidence is the failure mode: every objectified number is an assumption, and a plan optimal only if the guesses are exactly right is fragile -- mimicry of computation. YUKTI changes the target of autoformulation. Its representation is a typed-proposition graph whose relationships carry shape priors, coefficient uncertainty, and provenance. YUKTI routes each stage to an exact, nonlinear, or evolutionary solver; couples stages by a distributional Pareto hand-off; and introduces Assumption-Robust Pareto Frontiers (ARPF), resampling assumptions (including structural epsilon-contamination) to score how often each action survives (rho). We prove a bound making rho an exact factor of decision regret, add auditable traceability, and synthesize a benchmark-faithful data foundation when none exists (SRJANA). We validate three ways: under controlled misspecification the robust compromise cuts mean and tail regret by over 90% versus a naive point plan; on a regulated commercial decision we optimize inside a lawful action space and price the downside in euros; and on a real public dataset of 41,188 decisions an out-of-sample backtest beats the logged status quo by 34% and a naive point rule by 4% while reducing the optimizer's curse. The solvers are standard; we claim no benchmark-SOTA win. A head-to-head shows an LLM given the correct numbers, and single-objective optimization, both incur about 47x the held-out regret of YUKTI -- an LLM is a formulator, not a solver. Under long-range causal coupling, the forward hand-off becomes unsound, locating where it must become a backward-induction causal policy.

AI.tldr: YUKTI提出了一种鲁棒的自动规划公式方法，通过类型化命题图表示、分布化帕累托传递和假设鲁棒帕累托前沿（ARPF），在不确定条件下大幅降低决策遗憾（比LLM+单目标优化低约47倍）。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动规划管线（NL4Opt, OptiMUS, ORLM等）将词句情境转化为单一目标与点值系数后只求解一次，这种"确定性信心"在实际预算、精力、临床注意力的分配决策中是失败模式——每个目标化数字都是假设，仅在猜测完全正确时才最优，脆弱且只是"模拟计算"。需要一种能显式建模假设不确定性并产出鲁棒决策的自动公式化方法。
AI.method: YUKTI将自动公式化目标从"输出一个确定计划"改为"输出类型化命题图"，图中关系携带形状先验、系数不确定性和出处。各阶段分别路由到精确/非线性/进化求解器，通过分布化帕累托传递耦合各阶段；引入假设鲁棒帕累托前沿（ARPF），通过重采样假设（包括结构ε-污染）计算每个行动存活的频率（ρ），并证明ρ是决策遗憾的精确因子；在无合适基准时合成忠实数据基础（SRJANA）。
AI.result: 1) 在受控错误设定下，鲁棒折中比朴素点计划降低均值和尾部遗憾超过90%；2) 在受监管商业决策中，在合法行动空间内优化并量化下行风险（欧元计价）；3) 在41,188个决策的真实数据集上，样本外回测比记录的状态 quo 好34%，比朴素点规则好4%，同时减少优化者诅咒。与LLM+单目标优化的直接对比中，该组合持外遗憾约为YUKTI的47倍。
AI.conclusion: LLM是公式化工具（formulator）而非求解器（solver），在不确定决策中不应依赖LLM直接输出数值计划。YUKTI提供了一种更鲁棒的框架，且指出了在长程因果耦合下前向传递不再成立，需要转为逆向归纳因果策略。

title: Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems in Continuous Time
comment: 19 pages, 4 figures. Extends arXiv:2603.11560 to continuous time. Code: github.com/stevefatz95/fcms-continuous
summary: The Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems (FCMS) architecture formalizes closed-loop coordination through four abstract operators, two of which - the agent update operator $f_i$ and the environmental update operator $Ψ$ - are left axiomatically undefined in the original framework. To address this, $f_i$ is defined by Mechanism-Based Intelligence (MBI), where agents update locally through a decentralized price mechanism and economic principles, and $Ψ$ is defined by the Coupled Memory Graph Process (CMGP), a non-Markovian framework where the environment is treated as a physical substrate that records and responds to trajectory history coherently without external forcing. The resulting continuous-time FCMS instantiation achieves Lyapunov global dissipativity governed by the computable threshold $4β^2 < 2ημγ^2$. This generalizes both the discrete FCMS stability condition $4ηβ^2 < γ$ and CMGP's physical bifurcation threshold $α_c = 1/K$, confirming that memory dissipation must outpace feedback gain as a universal organizing principle. Numerical simulation with $N=2$ agents and mean-field validation at $N=10^6$ confirm the stability threshold and the self-reinforcing coordination cascade that emerges when it is violated.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种反馈耦合记忆系统（FCMS）架构，通过机制智能（MBI）和耦合记忆图过程（CMGP）分别定义了智能体更新算子和环境更新算子，建立了连续时间FCMS的李雅普诺夫全局耗散性条件，并通过数值仿真验证了稳定性阈值和自强化协调级联现象。
AI.motivation: 原始FCMS框架中两个核心算子（智能体更新算子f_i和环境更新算子Ψ）被公理化地未定义，限制了框架的具体应用和理论分析。
AI.method: 用MBI（基于去中心化价格机制和经济原理）定义f_i，用CMGP（非马尔可夫框架，将环境视为物理基底）定义Ψ，构建连续时间FCMS实例，并推导全局耗散性条件。
AI.result: 推导出连续时间FCMS的Lyapunov全局耗散性条件为4β² < 2ημγ²，推广了离散FCMS稳定性条件和CMGP物理分岔阈值，并通过N=2和N=10^6的数值仿真验证了稳定性阈值及违反时的自强化协调级联。
AI.conclusion: 记忆耗散必须超过反馈增益是一个通用组织原则，该框架为闭环协调系统提供了理论基础。

title: Silent Failures in Quantized LLM Reasoning: A Taxonomy-Based Analysis of Hollow Convergence and Failure Mode Shifts
summary: We show that post-training quantization can silently alter how large language models reason even when task accuracy is preserved. Using a six-category failure taxonomy validated by two independent human annotators (Cohen's $κ$ = 0.906), we classify 30,000 chain-of-thought outputs from five instruction-tuned LLMs (3B--14B parameters) across three quantization precisions (FP32, FP16, NF4) and four reasoning benchmarks. We find that while accuracy is robust across precisions (maximum 3.1 pp drop), Hollow Convergence (correct answers reached through incomplete or unverifiable reasoning) shows a significant size-dependent shift under NF4, dropping sharply for the two smallest models tested but remaining invariant for models at 12B parameters and above. This effect is also benchmark-specific: GSM8K is categorically immune while LogiQA and ARC-Challenge show the largest shifts. Furthermore, under NF4, Shortcut Collapse rises from 44% to 78% of wrong-answer failures in LLaMA 3.2-3B while Confidence Snowballing collapses from 15.8% to near zero, a qualitative shift invisible to accuracy metrics. Finally, we show Hollow Convergence cannot be reliably detected from surface-level text features (best F1 = 0.53), establishing it as a deployment-relevant failure mode that standard evaluation pipelines cannot catch.

AI.tldr: 论文发现后训练量化即使保持任务准确率，也会悄悄改变大语言模型的推理方式，并基于六类失败分类法分析了30,000条思维链输出，揭示了量化精度对推理缺陷的系统性影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注量化对模型准确率的影响，但忽略了量化是否改变模型推理过程本身。作者希望揭示量化在保持准确率的同时，是否引入了隐藏的推理缺陷。
AI.method: 1) 提出六类推理失败分类法，经两名独立标注者验证（Cohen's κ=0.906）；2) 对5个指令微调LLM（3B-14B参数）在FP32/FP16/NF4三种精度下，在4个推理基准上分析30,000条思维链输出；3) 使用表面文本特征检测空心收敛（Hollow Convergence）。
AI.result: 1) 准确率变化很小（最多下降3.1个百分点）；2) NF4精度下空心收敛出现显著的模型规模依赖性变化，小模型（<12B）受影响大；3) 不同基准敏感性不同：GSM8K免疫，LogiQA和ARC-Challenge变化最大；4) NF4下捷径崩溃从44%升至78%，信心雪崩从15.8%降至近乎为零；5) 空心收敛无法通过表面文本特征可靠检测（最佳F1=0.53）。
AI.conclusion: 后训练量化在准确率不变的情况下会系统性地改变LLM的推理模式，空心收敛是一种标准评估管线无法捕捉但实际部署相关的失败模式，需要新的评估方法。

title: Time Imprint: Learning Time-Aware Representations in Multi-Modal Knowledge Graphs
summary: Multi-Modal Knowledge Graphs (MMKGs) enrich entities with multiple modalities such as text and images, yet entities with highly similar multi-modal features remain difficult to distinguish. Temporal information of an entity can serve as an additional modality to disambiguate such entities, but existing approaches rarely treat time as a separate modality alongside text and images due to two major challenges: (1) sparse temporal semantics, which hinder alignment with richer modalities, and (2) multiple timestamps, which introduce noise or reduce robustness in representation learning. To address these challenges, we propose Time Imprint, a framework that treats time as an entity-level modality and jointly aligns temporal, textual, and visual representations via a three-view contrastive objective. Additionally, to mitigate multi-timestamp ambiguity, Time Imprint studies a compact timestamp subset selection design space and aggregates the selected timestamps into a discriminative temporal embedding with attention pooling, balancing temporal specificity and robustness. Experiments on three MMKG benchmarks demonstrate that Time Imprint achieves state-of-the-art link prediction performance, improving Hits@1 by up to 6.07\% overall and yielding up to 58\% gains on the subset of the top-1\% ambiguity samples. We further examine different fusion strategies and the sensitivity to timestamp availability and quality, clarifying when and why time-as-modality is most beneficial, while adding only modest training overhead. We release our code at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Time-Imprint.

AI.tldr: 提出Time Imprint框架，将时间作为独立模态与文本、图像联合对齐，通过三视图对比学习与紧凑时间戳选择策略提升多模态知识图谱的链接预测性能，尤其在高歧义实体上效果显著。
AI.motivation: 现有MMKG方法难以区分多模态特征高度相似的实体，而时间信息作为额外模态能有效消歧，但面临时间语义稀疏和多时间戳噪声两大挑战。
AI.method: 将时间作为实体级模态，设计三视图对比学习目标对齐时间、文本和视觉表示；通过紧凑时间戳子集选择与注意力池化聚合得到判别性时间嵌入。
AI.result: 在三个MMKG基准上达到SOTA链接预测性能，Hits@1整体提升6.07%，在top-1%高歧义样本上提升高达58%。
AI.conclusion: 时间作为独立模态能有效提升MMKG实体消歧能力，所提策略在有限训练开销下显著优于现有方法。

title: Prioritizing Search Space Regions in the Low Autocorrelation Binary Sequences Problem
summary: Low autocorrelation binary sequences problem (LABS) is a hard combinatorial optimization challenge with important applications in communications, signal processing, and satellite navigation. This paper proposes a hybrid search framework that combines Thompson sampling with parallel self-avoiding walks to adaptively allocate computational effort across restriction classes of the LABS search space. By modeling partitions as arms in a multi-armed bandit setting, the proposed method dynamically shifts search resources toward partitions that empirically produce higher merit factors while maintaining exploration of less-sampled regions. The approach is further accelerated through GPU-parallel execution, shared posterior updates, efficient neighborhood evaluation, and a Bloom filter for cycle prevention. In addition, we use a two-stage optimization strategy that first searches constrained partitioned skew-symmetric spaces and then refines the best candidates in the unrestricted space. Experiments on long binary sequences show that the proposed method improves the previously best-known results for 35 sequence lengths in the range $450 \le L \le 527$ and for $L=573$. In particular, we report a new longest sequence with merit factor exceeding $8.0$, obtained for $L=451$. The results also show that Thompson sampling effectively prioritizes partitions with better observed performance, confirming the value of online, data-driven resource allocation in LABS optimization. Overall, the proposed framework provides a scalable and effective strategy for high-performance merit factor maximization.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合汤普森采样与并行自回避 walks 的混合搜索框架，用于解决低自相关二进制序列问题，在35个序列长度上刷新了最优记录。
AI.motivation: 低自相关二进制序列问题（LABS）是通信、信号处理和卫星导航中的重要组合优化难题，现有方法在长序列上难以获得高优值因子。
AI.method: 1) 将搜索空间划分为限制类并用多臂老虎机建模，通过汤普森采样动态分配计算资源；2) GPU并行执行、共享后验更新、高效邻域评估和布隆过滤器防循环；3) 两阶段优化策略：先搜索约束分区斜对称空间，再在无限制空间中精炼最优候选。
AI.result: 在450≤L≤527范围的35个序列长度和L=573上刷新了最优记录，获得了优值因子超过8.0的新最长序列（L=451）。
AI.conclusion: 汤普森采样能有效优先选择表现更优的分区，在线数据驱动的资源分配在LABS优化中具有价值，所提框架为高优值因子最大化提供了可扩展且有效的策略。

title: GES-TSP: Graph Edge Sparsification for TSP
summary: Solving large-scale instances of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) exactly is computationally expensive. Researchers often employ graph sparsification methods to improve computational efficiency. Traditional sparsification methods typically rely on fixed heuristics and fail to fully exploit instance-specific structural information. In this paper, we propose Graph Edge Sparsification (GES), a learning-based sparsification approach for Euclidean TSP. By incorporating geometric structural information and combinatorial optimization technology, our proposed method adaptively generates a sparsification graph for different instances, significantly reducing the graph size and accelerating the solving process. Experimental results demonstrate that our sparsification method can prune up to 95% of edges on the MATILDA dataset, while keeping the solution gap within 1% of the optimal value. Moreover, our approach exhibits strong generalization capability on the TSPLIB benchmark.In some large-scale instances, the pruning rate exceeds 99%, while the optimality gap remains below 1%.

AI.tldr: 提出图边稀疏化(GES)方法，通过学习几何结构和组合优化技术，为欧几里得TSP自适应生成稀疏图，可剪枝95%以上边且解质量损失<1%。
AI.motivation: 传统TSP稀疏化方法依赖固定启发式规则，未能充分利用实例特有的结构信息，导致效率与精度难以兼得。
AI.method: 提出GES：一种基于学习的图边稀疏化方法，融合几何结构信息与组合优化技术，为不同TSP实例自适应生成稀疏图。
AI.result: 在MATILDA数据集上可剪枝95%边，解间隙<1%；在TSPLIB上泛化性强，大规模实例剪枝率>99%且最优间隙<1%。
AI.conclusion: GES在显著降低TSP求解计算量的同时，保持了接近最优的解质量，且具有良好的跨数据集泛化能力。

title: Replicating Belief, Not Bits: Epistemic State Replication for Agentic Systems
summary:
In distributed systems, the classical State Machine Replication (SMR) model assumes that correct replicas execute deterministic transitions to yield identical bitwise states. However, the rise of agentic distributed systems -- where autonomous, stochastic, and model-driven agents orchestrate infrastructure -- presents scenarios where deterministic, bitwise replication is insufficient. Replicas operating with generative models may exhibit divergent reasoning paths, summaries, and token boundaries, yet reach semantically equivalent and correct operational decisions. Forcing bitwise agreement across these stochastic participants degrades execution flexibility, induces context amnesia, and limits performance.
  We argue that in such settings replicas should agree on belief, not bits. We propose Epistemic State Replication (ESR), a belief-replication layer for agentic distributed systems that shifts the replication boundary from data visibility to knowledge visibility. We formalize the epistemic node state as a pair K = (L, B) separating the deterministic, immutable evidence log (L) from the stochastic, evolving belief lineage (B). To govern execution safety, we define Semantic Linearizability, which requires operations to reflect the latest committed operational meaning within a verifier-bounded semantic compatibility metric, and Bounded Eventual Coherence, which bounds expected semantic divergence under fair delivery, monotonic evidence, bounded verifier disturbance, and a contractive graft operator. We outline protocols for propagating derived insights using structured epistemic deltas, and formalize Verifiable Semantic Rollbacks to prune faulty premises from belief lineages without inducing context amnesia. We prototype ESR and report preliminary simulation results that show feasibility under the stated assumptions and illustrate reductions in secondary cognitive faults.

AI.tldr: 提出Epistemic State Replication (ESR)，一种面向智能体分布式系统的信念复制层，将复制边界从数据可见性扩展到知识可见性，允许随机模型驱动的副本在语义等价而非比特一致上达成共识。
AI.motivation: 传统状态机复制要求副本执行确定性转换以达到比特级一致，但智能体系统使用生成模型时，副本可能产生分歧的推理路径却仍能做出语义等价决策。强制比特级一致会降低执行灵活性、导致上下文遗忘并限制性能。
AI.method: 形式化定义认知节点状态 K=(L,B)，分离确定性不可变证据日志 L 与随机演化的信念谱系 B；提出语义线性化与有界最终一致性来保证执行安全；设计结构化认知增量传播协议与可验证语义回滚机制。
AI.result: 原型实现与初步仿真结果表明，在给定假设下ESR是可行的，并能减少次级认知错误。
AI.conclusion: 在智能体分布式系统中，副本应基于信念（而非比特）达成共识，ESR为此提供了可行的理论基础与协议设计。

title: Robust, Scalable Detection of Text Containment in Large Web-Crawled Corpora
summary: We present FindMyText, an open-source Python package designed to efficiently assess whether a given text appears, in part or in full, within a text corpus. The tool builds on prior techniques for document fingerprinting, but extends them with a novel mechanism to explicitly capture sequences of matching fingerprints. By identifying such chains, the tool can more reliably detect near-verbatim copies of a given text rather than mere textual similarities. This makes FindMyText particularly suited for verifying the presence of copyrighted material in a corpus. Leveraging a distributed, disk-based indexing framework, the system scales to large web-crawled datasets. Using a new benchmark for evaluating text containment methods, we show that FindMyText outperforms alternative approaches across three datasets (ArXiv papers, Wikipedia, and generic web content).

AI.tldr: FindMyText是一个开源Python包，通过文档指纹识别和匹配序列链机制，有效检测文本是否出现在语料库中，特别适用于版权内容验证，在三个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文本包含检测方法难以可靠区分逐字复制和一般文本相似性，缺乏有效的版权内容验证工具。
AI.method: 基于文档指纹识别技术，引入匹配指纹序列链机制以检测近逐字复制，采用分布式磁盘索引框架支持大规模网络抓取数据集。
AI.result: 在ArXiv论文、Wikipedia和通用网页内容三个数据集上，FindMyText在文本包含检测基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工具能有效检测版权材料在语料库中的存在，具有良好的可扩展性和实用性。

title: A Generalized Deep Non-negative Matrix Factorization Approach for SAR Automatic Target Recognition
summary: The deep nonnegative matrix factorization (DNMF) technique is proposed to address the low interpretability of deep learning-based methods in extracting multilayer features from synthetic aperture radar (SAR) target samples. However, existing DNMF methods employ a layer-by-layer decomposition strategy, which is prone to causing error accumulation and local optimum, thereby hindering a consistent improvement in recognition accuracy as the number of layer increases. In this paper, a robust multilayer feature extraction method, termed generalized deep non-negative matrix factorization (G-DNMF), is proposed to address the above challenges in SAR automatic target recognition (ATR). The G-DNMF aims global optimality and derives the update rules for each parameter using lagrangian multiplier method. The new update formula indicates that both the DNMF method based on the encoding matrix and the mixing matrix are special cases of the proposed method, theoretically demonstrating the universality of proposed method. In general, the proposed method discards the layer-by-layer decomposition strategy, thereby effectively mitigating the risk of local optima and eliminating error accumulation, leading to a significant improvement in DNMF's multi-layer feature extraction capability. The experimental results, by presenting the feature images extracted from each layer by G-DNMF and the reconstructed original images, verified the proposed method's pure additive understanding of multi-layer features and demonstrated its interpretability. The experimental results based on MSTAR and OpenSARship datasets show that G-DNMF outperforms existing DNMF algorithms and their derivatives in terms of stability and recognition performance.

AI.tldr: 提出广义深度非负矩阵分解(G-DNMF)方法，通过丢弃逐层分解策略，解决深度非负矩阵分解在SAR目标识别中的误差累积和局部最优问题，提升多层特征提取能力和识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度非负矩阵分解(DNMF)方法采用逐层分解策略，容易导致误差累积和陷入局部最优，限制了层数增加时识别精度的提升。
AI.method: 提出广义深度非负矩阵分解(G-DNMF)，使用拉格朗日乘子法推导各参数的更新规则，抛弃逐层分解策略，理论上证明了编码矩阵和混合矩阵为基础的DNMF方法均为其特例。
AI.result: 在MSTAR和OpenSARship数据集上，G-DNMF在稳定性和识别性能上优于现有DNMF算法及其变体；通过特征图像和重构图像验证了多层特征的纯加性可解释性。
AI.conclusion: G-DNMF有效缓解了局部最优风险并消除了误差累积，显著提升了DNMF的多层特征提取能力，具有良好的可解释性和识别性能。

title: What Context Does a Coding Agent Actually Need to Act?
summary: A modern coding agent can hold an entire repository in its context window. Most of its reading is wasted -- and the interesting question is not how much context an agent can use, but what it actually \emph{needs}. We study that question at the moment it matters most: when the agent must \emph{edit} code. Separating \emph{finding} the work site from \emph{acting} on it, we hold localization fixed with an oracle, vary only how the code is represented, and score context against real issue resolution on SWE-bench Verified. The answer is starkly minimal. The signal lives in the code being edited itself: natural-language summaries of it answer almost none of the behavioral questions that the source answers ($4/45$ vs.\ $27/45$, held-out repositories, independent judge), and the gap belongs to the representation, not the summarizer -- a frontier model's summaries score exactly as poorly as a 3B model's. The surrounding context hardly matters either: across every multi-file instance in Verified, under a protocol frozen before any data, rendering a file's remainder as UML skeletons and signatures resolves no more issues than deleting that remainder outright ($N{=}70$, exact McNemar $p{=}0.75$). That was our registered hypothesis, and it failed. Compressed context, meanwhile, matches whole files at a third of the tokens: a resolved issue costs $19$K context tokens, not $94$K. The instrument also yielded a finding the field should keep: temperature-0 API inference flips ${\sim}9\%$ of per-instance outcomes between byte-identical runs. That is a noise floor under every small effect reported on this benchmark, including ours. We release the instrument -- gold-validated environments, per-instance proof that every reference edit is expressible from every arm's context, deterministic patch construction, and pre-registered hypotheses whose nulls we publish.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究编码智能体在代码编辑任务中真正需要多少上下文信息。通过将定位与操作分离、使用oracle固定定位、变化代码表示方式，发现关键信号仅在于被编辑的代码本身，自然语言摘要和周围上下文几乎不提供有用信息。压缩上下文能以三分之一token数达到完整文件效果。此外发现温度0的API推理存在约9%的噪声底限。
AI.motivation: 现代编码智能体可以将整个代码仓库放入上下文窗口，但大部分阅读是浪费的。作者希望探究在编辑代码这一关键时刻，智能体真正需要哪些上下文信息，而非能使用多少上下文。
