AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对科学计算代码（如PHITS）的自动执行评分评估，无法有效衡量LLM在专业领域的实用能力。
AI.method: 构建包含282个任务的PHITSBench基准，涵盖编辑、修复和从头生成三类任务，采用复合度量评分（执行成功+输出一致性），评估了五种GPT-5.4配置。
AI.result: 零样本时编辑任务成功率95%，修复任务70%，但从头生成为0%；引入知识库后从头生成成功率升至57%；智能体执行提升至66-73%。
AI.conclusion: 未来AI辅助辐射输运建模的进展不仅依赖基础模型进步，更需要机器可读知识库、领域训练数据和执行评分评估环境。

title: UNIBROWSE: A Data-to-Agent Framework for Multimodal BrowseComp
summary: Multimodal BrowseComp tasks require agents to combine perception, tool use, and long-horizon reasoning over dynamic web content, challenging their ability to handle compositional structure, open-world uncertainty, and multimodal integration across extended interactions. Crucially, real-world multimodal browsing involves three distinct information-flow patterns: text-only, image-to-text, and text-to-image, yet existing data construction methods cover only the text-only and image-to-text patterns, leaving text-to-image largely unaddressed and limiting agent generality and robustness. We introduce UNIBROWSE, a unified data pipeline that for the first time simultaneously generates training data covering all three patterns, augments curated knowledge graphs with live web retrieval for improved fidelity, and introduces a novel metric of exploration degree to filter low-signal instances for efficient reinforcement learning. Through this pipeline, we produce high-quality cold-start tool-use trajectories and exploration-rich QA pairs, and train a 35B-scale agent via supervised fine-tuning and exploration-aware RL.The resulting UNIBROWSE agent achieves state-of-the-art performance on multimodal BrowseComp benchmarks, attaining an average accuracy of 54.4 across five diverse benchmarks -- an improvement of 10.5 points over its base model Qwen3.5-35B-A3B -- and surpassing serveral closed-source agent workflows such as GPT-5 (42.9), Gemini-2.5 Pro (44.8), and Gemini-2.5 Flash (41.3).

AI.tldr: 提出UNIBROWSE统一数据流水线，覆盖多模态浏览的三种信息流模式（纯文本、图像到文本、文本到图像），通过增强知识图谱、实时网页检索和探索度指标，训练35B规模的多模态浏览代理，在五个基准测试上平均54.4%准确率，超越GPT-5、Gemini-2.5 Pro等闭源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态浏览数据构建仅覆盖纯文本和图像到文本两种信息流模式，忽略了文本到图像模式，限制了代理的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出UNIBROWSE统一数据流水线：同时生成三种信息流模式的训练数据；用实时网页检索增强知识图谱；引入探索度指标过滤低质量样本；通过SFT和探索感知RL训练35B代理。
AI.result: 在五个多模态浏览基准测试上平均准确率54.4%，超过基线模型Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 10.5个百分点，并超越GPT-5(42.9)、Gemini-2.5 Pro(44.8)等闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: UNIBROWSE通过统一数据覆盖和探索感知训练，有效提升了多模态浏览代理在复杂真实场景下的表现，实现了SOTA。

title: FlashBEV: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact BEV Transformation with IO-Awareness
summary: Bird's-eye-view (BEV) perception is a core component of camera-based 3D understanding in autonomous driving, where view transformation (VT) maps multi-camera image features into a unified BEV representation. Sampling-based view transformation (Sampling-VT) is attractive because it supports dense and continuous BEV aggregation for high-resolution and long-range perception. Its deployment bottleneck, however, is systems-level: standard tensorized implementations of Sampling-VT -- which we refer to as Tensorized Sampling-VT -- explicitly materialize large height-dependent intermediate tensors, causing memory and latency costs that scale poorly with vertical resolution and the number of cameras. We revisit Tensorized Sampling-VT from an operator-execution perspective and show that it follows a gather-reduction pattern: each BEV query independently accumulates contributions across cameras and height bins, enabling thread-local accumulation with on-the-fly recomputation that eliminates the need to materialize height- and camera-dependent intermediates. Based on this insight, we propose FlashBEV, a fully fused and IO-aware execution strategy mathematically equivalent to Tensorized Sampling-VT (same operator output) while substantially reducing global memory traffic and kernel-launch overhead. Experiments show that FlashBEV achieves more than an order of magnitude lower peak GPU memory and significant inference-latency speedups, with memory effectively independent of the number of height bins, reducing the operator's peak memory to O(BCXY) (output only). This unlocks higher BEV range/resolution and vertical discretization within fixed deployment budgets on memory-constrained devices. Our contribution is an execution redesign -- same math, different execution -- that removes a key scalability barrier for deployment-ready Sampling-VT. Code available at https://github.com/yokosyun/FlashBEV

AI.tldr: FlashBEV是一种针对鸟瞰视角感知中采样式视图变换的内存高效执行策略，通过融合算子设计和IO感知优化，在不改变数学等价性的前提下，显著降低峰值GPU内存和推理延迟，使内存占用与高度方向离散化数量解耦。
AI.motivation: 标准张量化实现的采样式视图变换（Tensorized Sampling-VT）在部署时存在严重的内存和延迟瓶颈，因为其显式物化了依赖于高度和相机数量的大规模中间张量，导致计算开销随垂直分辨率和相机数量急剧增长，限制了高分辨率、长距离BEV感知在内存受限设备上的部署。
AI.method: 作者重新审视Tensorized Sampling-VT的算子执行过程，发现其遵循"收集-归约"模式：每个BEV查询独立跨相机和高度箱累加贡献。基于此，提出FlashBEV，采用完全融合的IO感知执行策略，通过线程本地累加和即时重计算，避免物化高度和相机依赖的中间张量，同时减少全局内存访问和内核启动开销。
AI.result: FlashBEV相比标准实现，峰值GPU内存降低超过一个数量级，推理延迟显著加速，内存占用变得与高度箱数量无关，降为O(BCXY)（仅输出张量），从而在固定部署预算下支持更高的BEV范围/分辨率和垂直离散化。
AI.conclusion: 本文的贡献在于执行层面的重新设计——相同数学运算，不同执行方式——消除了部署就绪的采样式VT的关键可扩展性障碍。

title: Learning Predictive Ambiguity Sets for Decision-Focused Distributionally Robust Optimization
summary: Predict-then-optimize systems usually compress uncertainty into a point forecast and then solve a downstream optimization problem as if the forecast were reliable. Distributionally robust optimization (DRO) offers protection against misspecification, but the ambiguity set is often centered at historical samples and uses a fixed radius. We propose \emph{learned predictive ambiguity sets} (LPAS): a deep contextual model outputs a finite nominal scenario distribution, a state-dependent Wasserstein radius, and optionally an anisotropic ground metric. These outputs define a contextual ambiguity set that feeds a DRO decision layer. The radius is trained by a combination of conditional quantile calibration, size regularization, and downstream decision loss, so that robustness is adaptive rather than globally fixed. We derive the finite dual form used by the decision layer, present a staged training algorithm, and evaluate the method on distributionally robust portfolio optimization with 20 S&P 500 constituents from 2018--2026. The proposed method substantially improves over equal-weight, predict-then-optimize, and historical Wasserstein DRO baselines, achieving 26.28% annualized return, Sharpe ratio 1.30, final wealth 1.61, and lower tail loss than a deep fixed-radius DRO baseline while using a smaller average radius. The results show that learned ambiguity radii can recover most of the performance of strong fixed-radius DRO while reducing unnecessary conservatism and improving regime adaptivity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出学习式预测模糊集（LPAS），通过深度上下文模型输出情境依赖的Wasserstein半径和名义场景分布，实现自适应分布鲁棒优化，在投资组合优化中显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统"预测-然后-优化"系统将不确定性压缩为点预测，导致下游优化不可靠；分布鲁棒优化（DRO）虽能应对误设定，但其模糊集通常基于历史样本且半径固定，缺乏自适应能力。
AI.method: 提出LPAS框架：深度上下文模型输出有限名义场景分布、状态依赖的Wasserstein半径及可选各向异性地面度量；结合条件分位数校准、规模正则化和下游决策损失训练半径；推导有限对偶形式并设计分阶段训练算法。
AI.result: 在2018-2026年20只标普500成分股的投资组合优化中，LPAS实现年化收益26.28%、夏普比率1.30、最终财富1.61，尾部损失低于固定半径DRO基线，且平均半径更小。
AI.conclusion: 学习式模糊半径能恢复强固定半径DRO的大部分性能，同时减少不必要的保守性并提升对市场状态的适应性。

title: Semantic Drift and the Stability of Operator Control in Reasoning-Class Decision Support Systems
summary: The article investigates the fundamental problem of ensuring the stability of operator control and preserving goal-targeting in hybrid human-machine decision support systems (DSS) of a new generation. Based on a two-month continuous longitudinal experiment on the joint design of a monograph-format textual array, the latent phenomenon of semantic context drift in large language models of deep logical reasoning (Reasoning LLMs) is verified and described. A mathematical model of interaction in the human-machine interface is proposed, and an original metric is introduced - the operator control stability coefficient, which takes into account the non-linear contextual pressure of hidden reasoning chains. Within the paradigm of the cognitome theory, a critical point of control functions inversion is captured. Engineering recommendations are formulated for implementing dynamic relational arbitration loops based on a modified hierarchical similarity model.

AI.tldr: 本文发现并验证了深度逻辑推理LLM中存在语义上下文漂移现象，提出了人机交互数学模型和操作员控制稳定性系数，并在认知组理论范式下捕捉到控制功能反转临界点，给出了工程建议。
AI.motivation: 解决新一代混合人机决策支持系统中操作控制的稳定性与目标保持这一基础性问题。
AI.method: 基于两个月的连续纵向实验（联合设计专著格式文本阵列），验证了Reasoning LLM的语义上下文漂移现象；提出了人机交互数学模型和操作员控制稳定性系数（考虑隐藏推理链的非线性上下文压力）。
AI.result: 在认知组理论范式下捕捉到了控制功能反转的临界点。
AI.conclusion: 提出了基于改进层次相似性模型的动态关系仲裁环的工程建议。

title: Demographic Prompting at Scale: When More Attributes Hurt LLM--Human Agreement
summary: We investigate how annotator demographic attributes, supplied as prompt cues, shape the alignment between large language model (LLM) predictions and human annotations across five tasks. Using five open-source LLMs, we systematically vary the number and composition of demographic components in the prompt, spanning every combination from single-attribute through full-attribute configurations. Our experiments reveal three principal findings. First, alignment consistently peaks with one to three high-signal attributes and degrades under the full attribute set, establishing a clear over-specification threshold. Second, the overall magnitude of demographic influence on human annotations does not predict which attributes improve LLM alignment; instead, both the learnability and the directional coherence of each attribute's annotation signal need to be considered jointly. Third, neuron probing reveals that specialized activation correlates with alignment gains only under coherent annotation signals, and that activation volume alone does not imply steerability. Together, these results demonstrate that demographic prompting is not a monolithic intervention: its utility is highly context-dependent, shaped by attribute signal quality, task characteristics, and model architecture.

AI.tldr: 研究人口统计提示如何影响LLM与人类标注的对齐，发现1-3个高信号属性效果最佳，过度指定会降低表现，且属性影响取决于信号质量和任务特性。
AI.motivation: 探究人口统计属性（如年龄、性别等）作为提示线索时，如何影响大型语言模型预测与人类标注之间的对齐程度，以及这种影响的内在机制。
AI.method: 使用5个开源LLM，在5个任务上系统变化提示中人口统计组件的数量和组成（从单属性到全属性组合），并通过神经元探针分析激活模式。
AI.result: 1) 对齐在1-3个高信号属性时达到峰值，全属性集下降；2) 人口统计对标注的整体影响不能预测哪些属性改善对齐，需联合考虑可学习性和方向一致性；3) 神经元激活专业化仅在信号一致时与对齐增益相关。
AI.conclusion: 人口统计提示并非单一干预手段，其效用高度依赖上下文，受属性信号质量、任务特性和模型架构影响。

title: Label-Free Target-Domain Adaptation for Unconstrained Event-Image Feature Matching via Dual-Stage Distillation
comment: Accepted to ACM MM 2026. The source code and benchmark will be made publicly available at https://github.com/ZhonghuaYi/nexus2-official
summary: Building pixel-level correspondence between event and image data is a fundamental task for multi-sensor systems. However, existing cross-modal matching methods are largely restricted by their reliance on either matching labels or strictly aligned hardware, which limits them to unlabeled and unconstrained real-world scenarios where neither matching ground truth nor prior sensor relationships are available. To address this, we propose a novel two-stage training paradigm. First, we leverage large-scale data to perform label-agnostic distillation pretraining, upgrading optimization objectives with distribution-based and contrastive losses to learn highly generalizable representations. Second, to tackle unlabeled and unconstrained downstream data, we introduce an epipolar-guided self-distillation framework. By utilizing consistency verification to isolate robust matches and incorporating geometric confidence derived from an external epipolar prior, our model can effectively self-evolve directly on target domains without any supervision. Furthermore, we introduce a rigorous cross-modal evaluation benchmark based on TUM-VIE, featuring physically separated cameras with distinct intrinsic parameters and resolutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on both MVSEC and TUM-VIE pose estimation tasks. The source code and benchmark will be made publicly available at https://github.com/ZhonghuaYi/nexus2-official.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无标签、无约束条件下的跨模态（事件与图像）像素级匹配方法，通过两阶段训练范式（标签无关蒸馏预训练 + 对极引导自蒸馏）实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态匹配方法依赖标注数据或严格对齐的硬件，无法适用于无标签、无约束的真实场景。
AI.method: 两阶段训练范式：1) 大规模数据上的标签无关蒸馏预训练（分布损失+对比损失）；2) 对极引导自蒸馏框架（一致性验证+几何置信度），实现无监督域内自我进化。
AI.result: 在MVSEC和TUM-VIE位姿估计任务上达到SOTA，并构建了基于TUM-VIE的跨模态评估基准。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法无需标注和硬件约束即可实现高效的跨模态匹配，在真实场景中具有强泛化能力。

title: A Strong Balanced-Softmax Classifier-Retraining Baseline for Long-Tailed Recognition
summary: Long-tailed recognition methods often modify losses, margins, or representations to reduce the dominance of frequent classes. We ask whether, after Balanced Softmax training, the remaining tail error can be reduced by retraining only the classifier. We evaluate BS-cRT, a two-stage procedure that trains a backbone and cosine classifier with Balanced Softmax, freezes the backbone, and updates only the classifier on balanced episodic batches. The second stage keeps the empirical-prior Balanced Softmax objective and uses raw cosine logits at inference. Across CIFAR-100-LT, CIFAR-10-LT, ImageNet-LT, and Places-LT, this classifier-only step consistently improves Few-shot accuracy over the matched Balanced Softmax checkpoint. At imbalance factor 100, Few-shot gains are +5.15 points on CIFAR-100-LT and +5.83 on CIFAR-10-LT; on ImageNet-LT and Places-LT, gains are +6.92 and +9.78 points, respectively, with a Top-1/Few-shot trade-off on ImageNet-LT. We also analyze Counterfactual Boundary Risk Minimization (CBRM), a boundary-probe extension using prototype-based features near decision boundaries. CBRM identifies two failure modes: scaled-logit cosine margins destabilize training, and corrected hardest-negative probes remain head-class anchored. The results support BS-cRT as a practical classifier-side baseline and indicate that boundary supervision must account for class frequency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BS-cRT方法，在Balanced Softmax训练后仅重训分类器，显著提升长尾识别中的小样本准确率，并分析了边界监督的局限性。
AI.motivation: 探索在长尾识别中，经过Balanced Softmax训练后，仅通过重训分类器能否进一步减少尾部类别的错误。
AI.method: 两阶段流程：先用Balanced Softmax训练骨干网络和余弦分类器，然后冻结骨干网络，仅在平衡的小批量数据上更新分类器，保持经验先验Balanced Softmax目标，推理时使用原始余弦logits。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100-LT、CIFAR-10-LT、ImageNet-LT和Places-LT上，分类器重训步骤一致提升了小样本准确率；不平衡因子100时，CIFAR-100-LT提升+5.15，CIFAR-10-LT提升+5.83，ImageNet-LT提升+6.92，Places-LT提升+9.78。
AI.conclusion: BS-cRT是一种实用的分类器侧基线方法；边界监督必须考虑类别频率，否则会出现头类锚定等问题。

title: Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing without arity actions
summary: Non-binary bottom-up constituency parsing is usually taken to require arity actions: reductions such as \(\textsc{Reduce-}X\#k\) specify both the mother label and the number of children to be composed. We show that this arity parameter is not a necessary transition primitive. Our parser introduces constituent labels separately and recovers reduction spans from delimiter-bounded stack configurations. In a well-formed reduction configuration, arity is uniquely determined by the active delimiter and the label marker, making it a derived property of parser state rather than an action label. This factorization removes label--arity-specific reduce actions while preserving direct construction of original non-binary trees. Experiments on PTB and CTB show that the delimiter-guided parser remains competitive with an arity-specific bottom-up baseline under the same implementation framework, with substantially smaller action inventories. Analyses further show that its predicted arity profile remains close to the gold treebanks and that high-arity constituents do not collapse when arity actions are removed.

AI.tldr: 提出一种非二元自底向上的成分句法分析方法，通过分隔符引导消除arity动作，在PTB和CTB上取得有竞争力的结果。
AI.motivation: 传统非二元成分句法分析需要arity动作（如Reduce-X#k）来指定标签和子节点数量，这增加了动作空间复杂性。作者希望证明arity参数不是必需的，可以通过分隔符引导的栈配置来派生。
AI.method: 将成分标签引入与归约跨度恢复分离，通过活动分隔符和标签标记唯一确定arity；从分隔符限定的栈配置中恢复归约跨度，从而消除标签-arity特定的归约动作。
AI.result: 在PTB和CTB上，分隔符引导的分析器与传统的arity基线方法性能相当，但动作库存大幅减少；预测的arity分布与真实树库接近，高arity成分在去除arity动作后没有崩溃。
AI.conclusion: arity是分析器状态的派生属性而非动作标签，这一分解方法有效且保持了非二元树的直接构建能力。

title: CVKD-UDA: Cross-View Knowledge Distillation for 3D Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Segmentation
summary: 3D unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) segmentation mitigates the high cost of manual annotations of the new domain data. Self-training has emerged as the dominant approach in this area, where its success heavily depends on a well-initialized warm-up model to generate reliable pseudo labels. However, existing methods often depend on source supervision or output-level adversarial alignment to obtain the warm-up model, which suffer from limited generalization and training instability due to the large domain gap between domains. Constructing domain-similar representations is an effective way to bridge this gap. In this work, we propose CVKD-UDA, which revisits voxel size as a core design factor to construct domain-similar representations and leverages cross-view complementary cues to balance transferability and discriminability of the warm-up model. First, we generate two complementary views by varying voxel sizes and introduce a cross-view knowledge distillation (CVKD) to enhance generalization and target perception of the model. Second, to balance transferability and discriminability, we design a lightweight Decouple-Adapter and an auxiliary imitation classifier to decouple cross-view knowledge transfer. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks demonstrate that CVKD-UDA effectively improves the performance of self-training methods and provides a new perspective for 3D UDA segmentation. Our code will be available at GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CVKD-UDA方法，通过调整体素大小构建域相似表示，并利用跨视图知识蒸馏提升3D无监督域自适应分割中自训练模型的初始化质量。
AI.motivation: 现有3D UDA方法依赖源域监督或输出级对抗对齐来获得自训练的暖启动模型，但跨域差距大导致泛化有限和训练不稳定。
AI.method: 1) 通过改变体素大小生成两种互补视图；2) 引入跨视图知识蒸馏(CVKD)增强模型泛化和目标感知；3) 设计轻量级Decouple-Adapter和辅助模仿分类器解耦跨视图知识迁移，平衡迁移性和判别性。
AI.result: 在两个基准上的大量实验表明，CVKD-UDA有效提升了自训练方法的性能，为3D UDA分割提供了新视角。
AI.conclusion: 体素大小是构建域相似表示的关键因素，跨视图互补线索能有效平衡暖启动模型的迁移性和判别性。

title: From Direction to Magnitude: How Multimodal Instruction-Tuning Reorganizes the Geometric Encoding of Identity-Specifying Prompts in Transformer Hidden States
comment: 16 pages, 8 tables. Working draft v0.3. Uses Ollivier-Ricci curvature and edge-wise Wasserstein-1 as primary geometric statistic; four models (Gemma-4-E4B, Gemma-4-E4B-it, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B, Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct)
summary: We investigate whether identity-specifying system prompts produce statistically distinguishable geometric fingerprints in the hidden-state trajectories of four open-weight transformer language models spanning four post-training regimes: no training (Gemma-4-E4B base), multimodal RLHF (Gemma-4-E4B-it), RL distillation (DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B), and SFT (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct). Three prompt conditions (an identity-specifying axis prompt, a length-matched generic-assistant prompt, and a 26-token vanilla baseline) are compared via five geometric metrics, principally the 1-Wasserstein distance between edge-wise distributions of Ollivier-Ricci curvature on k-NN trajectory graphs. Claims rest on trajectory-level permutation tests with multiple geometric controls (teacher-forced content controls, temporal-chain vs k-NN topology, ABT-projected k-NN, angular vs Euclidean graph construction, B=5000 permutations on borderline statistics). The central finding is a qualitative reorganization of identity encoding across the instruction-tuning boundary: in the base model the fingerprint is direction-coded (separation 0.034, p=0.002 under angular k-NN); in the multimodal instruction-tuned model it migrates into the magnitude (angular separation collapses to p=0.439 while Euclidean survives at p=0.042, and the mean norm of the first generated state inverts its length-ordering, being lowest for the identity prompt). This direction-to-magnitude reorganization is specific to the multimodal instruction-tuning regime, absent under RL distillation and SFT. A teacher-forced control attributes ~30% of the free-running cosine signal to prompt-driven effects. We position W_1 on edge-wise Ollivier-Ricci distributions on k-NN trajectory graphs as a methodological contribution of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了不同训练后状态下，身份指定系统提示是否会在变压器语言模型的隐藏状态轨迹中产生可区分的几何指纹，发现多模态指令微调导致身份编码从方向编码重组为幅度编码。
AI.motivation: 探究身份指定系统提示是否在语言模型的隐藏状态轨迹中留下可统计区分的几何指纹，以及不同训练后范式（基础模型、多模态RLHF、RL蒸馏、SFT）如何影响这种编码方式。
AI.method: 使用四个开源变压器语言模型（覆盖无训练、多模态RLHF、RL蒸馏、SFT四种训练后范式），通过三种提示条件（身份指定轴提示、长度匹配的通用助手提示、26令牌基线提示）进行对比，采用五种几何度量（主要是k-NN轨迹图上Ollivier-Ricci曲率边分布的1-Wasserstein距离），并结合轨迹级别的置换检验和多种几何控制方法。
AI.result: 在多模态指令调优模型中，身份编码从方向编码（角度k-NN下分离度0.034, p=0.002）重组为幅度编码（角度分离p=0.439，欧氏分离p=0.042，首个生成状态的平均范数反转）。这种重组是多模态指令调优特有的，在RL蒸馏和SFT中未出现。
AI.conclusion: 不同训练后范式对身份提示的几何编码方式有本质影响，多模态指令调优会导致身份编码从方向维度迁移到幅度维度；同时，k-NN轨迹图上的Ollivier-Ricci曲率边分布W_1距离可作为有价值的方法论贡献。

title: Exploring Agentic Workflows for Generating High Quality Math Visual Aids
comment: 13 pages, 9 figures. Exploratory course project on agentic workflows for generating and evaluating K 12 mathematical diagrams
summary: Mathematical diagrams play a crucial role in K 12 education, both as problem components and as scaffolding for student comprehension. However, current AI tools, including Large Language Models (LLMs), struggle to reliably generate accurate and pedagogically sound visual diagrams, even when provided with detailed descriptions. A significant gap therefore remains in the reliable generation of diagrams for middle school mathematics. To address this, we introduce an agentic workflow that enables LLM agents to evaluate the quality of generated visuals and use this feedback to iteratively improve their outputs. This self improvement loop aims to enhance the accuracy and educational appropriateness of AI generated diagrams. Our research investigates two questions. First, can LLMs accurately generate quality assurance questions for a visual aid given specific criteria for visual quality? Second, given valid quality assurance questions, can Vision Language Models effectively evaluate generated K 12 visual aids and use the resulting feedback to improve them iteratively? We conduct an exploratory evaluation of our agentic workflow and identify key areas for improvement, including stronger spatial reasoning and more comprehensive coverage of diagram features in the generated quality assurance questions. Our results provide preliminary evidence that this approach can improve the reliability and educational value of AI generated mathematical diagrams.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于代理工作流的自改进方法，让LLM代理通过评估和迭代反馈来生成更准确、更具教育价值的K-12数学图表。
AI.motivation: 当前AI工具（包括LLM）难以可靠地生成准确且教育上合理的数学图表，即使提供了详细描述也存在明显不足。
AI.method: 设计了一个代理工作流：LLM代理根据质量标准生成质量保证问题，然后VLM利用这些问题评估生成的图表，并将评估结果作为反馈进行迭代改进。
AI.result: 初步实验表明该方法能提升图表可靠性和教育价值，但空间推理能力和质量保证问题的特征覆盖度仍需改进。
AI.conclusion: 该自改进工作流有望提升AI生成数学图表的可靠性和教育适用性，为K-12教育场景提供更有效的AI辅助工具。

title: Eval-Pair Matrix: Answer-Paired Meta-Evaluation of LLM Judges for Grounded RAG
summary: LLM-as-a-judge evaluation is widely used for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), but reusing the same model family as both generator and judge makes self-leniency difficult to identify. We introduce Eval-Pair Matrix, a controlled meta evaluation protocol for source-grounded RAG. Starting from GaRAGe questions and grounding passages, we induce one hidden answer-causal contradiction per record, generate answers from perturbed passages with GPT, Grok, and Gemini models, and then use the same models as blind judges to evaluate each answer against the original passages. The experiment contains 300 core records, 897 labeled generator outputs, and 2,683 judge verdicts in a crossed 3 x 3 matrix; the primary analysis uses 275 fully validated records. Instead of comparing diagonal and off-diagonal cells across different answers, we estimate same-model effects by pairing judges on the exact same candidate answer. This changes the interpretation: diagonal and off diagonal F1 are similar, and the paired same-model recall effect is near zero (-0.5 pp; 95% cluster bootstrap CI [-2.7, +1.7]). The only robust paired gap is lower matching-judge flagging for answers that avoided the induced claim (-4.3 pp). A targeted human evaluation finds that reviewed apparent false positives are alternate source-error detections, mistakes in labeling whether the induced claim was adopted, or unclear cases; none were adjudicated as genuine false alarms. The lesson is methodological: RAG judge studies should report full matrices, answer-paired effects, behavior strata, and label-task alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Eval-Pair Matrix方法，通过控制实验和配对分析评估RAG系统中LLM-as-a-judge的自宽容偏差，发现相同模型作为判断者和生成者的自宽容效应很小。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-as-a-judge评估RAG时，难以识别使用相同模型家族作为生成器和判断者带来的自宽容偏差。
AI.method: 设计Eval-Pair Matrix控制实验协议，使用GPT、Grok、Gemini三种模型在300条核心记录上构建3×3交叉矩阵，通过配对相同候选答案来估计同模型效应。
AI.result: 对角线和离线F1相似，配对同模型召回效应接近零(-0.5 pp)，唯一的稳健差异是匹配判断者对避免诱导声明的答案标记更低(-4.3 pp)。
AI.conclusion: RAG判断者研究应报告完整矩阵、答案配对效应、行为分层和标签任务对齐。

title: EMBRACE: A Multi-task Framework for Comprehensive Quality Assessment in Cleavage-stage Embryo
summary: Cleavage-stage embryo assessment in in vitro fertilization requires the integrated interpretation of cytoplasmic fragmentation, developmental stage, and blastomere symmetry. However, conventional visual assessment is affected by observer variability, particularly when fragmented regions are small, irregular, or low contrast. This study presents EMBRACE, a multi-task deep learning framework for jointly performing cytoplasmic-fragmentation segmentation, t2/t4 developmental-stage classification, and blastomere-symmetry grading from static cleavage-stage embryo microscopy images. EMBRACE combines a shared ResNet-50 backbone, a concatenation-based multi-scale feature-fusion (C-MSFF) module, a U-Net-style segmentation decoder, and two task-specific classification heads. After predefined inclusion and exclusion criteria, 9,137 annotated embryo images were divided into 7,309 training, 914 validation, and 914 held-out test images. On the held-out test set, EMBRACE achieved a Dice coefficient of 0.781 and an intersection over union of 0.677 for fragmentation segmentation. Developmental-stage classification achieved an accuracy of 0.995, macro-F1 of 0.994, and AUC of 1.000. Blastomere-symmetry grading achieved a balanced accuracy of 0.901, macro-F1 of 0.907, and quadratic weighted kappa of 0.859. These findings support the feasibility of combining spatially inspectable fragmentation localization with embryo-level morphology assessment in a single framework. External and prospective validation is required before clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EMBRACE，一个多任务深度学习框架，用于从体外受精的卵裂期胚胎显微镜图像中同时进行细胞质碎片分割、发育阶段分类和卵裂球对称性分级，在测试集上取得了良好性能。
AI.motivation: 传统胚胎视觉评估受观察者差异影响较大，尤其当碎片区域小、不规则或对比度低时，需要一种自动化、标准化的评估方法。
AI.method: EMBRACE框架采用共享ResNet-50骨干网络、级联多尺度特征融合模块、U-Net风格分割解码器和两个任务特定的分类头，实现多任务联合学习。
AI.result: 碎片分割Dice=0.781，IoU=0.677；发育阶段分类准确率0.995，macro-F1=0.994，AUC=1.000；卵裂球对称性分级平衡准确率0.901，macro-F1=0.907，二次加权kappa=0.859。
AI.conclusion: 将空间可检查的碎片定位与胚胎水平形态评估结合在单一框架中是可行的，但临床应用前需进行外部和前瞻性验证。

title: Nonlinear Axiomatic Attribution for Cooperative Games
summary: The Shapley value is a widely used concept in attribution problems, as it uniquely satisfies the axioms of linearity, consistency, equal treatment, and efficiency. Often, the inclusion AUC metric is used to evaluate the quality of player rankings, in order to identify positively participating players. However, it can be established that the Shapley value is not always reliable for this purpose. The core issue lies in its linearity: the Shapley value acts as a linear operator with an excessively large null space, which is likely to contain non-negligible perturbations that remain indistinguishable to the operator. To address this limitation, we explore the design of nonlinear axiomatic attribution methods. Inspired by the least core, which is a popular nonlinear substitute for the Shapley value, we introduce a class of nonlinear attribution methods that retain the remaining necessary axioms. Each method yields a contribution vector that is the unique optimal solution to a minimization problem, which aims to approximate utility functions as faithfully as possible. In terms of the inclusion AUC metric, our experiments demonstrate the potential effectiveness of these methods compared to Shapley value variants that relax only the efficiency axiom. Our code is available at https://github.com/watml/nonlinear-axiom.

AI.tldr: 本文指出Shapley值的线性性质导致其存在过大零空间，使其在排序评估中不可靠，提出基于least core的非线性公理化归因方法，通过求解最优化问题得到贡献向量，实验表明该方法在inclusion AUC指标上优于放松效率公理的Shapley值变体。
AI.motivation: Shapley值虽然满足线性性、一致性、平等对待和效率等公理，但其线性算子具有过大的零空间，容易包含不可忽略的扰动，导致在识别正向参与玩家时不可靠。
AI.method: 受least core启发，设计一类非线性公理化归因方法，保留必要的公理，通过求解最小化问题逼近效用函数，得到唯一的贡献向量。
AI.result: 在inclusion AUC指标上，所提出的非线性方法相比仅放松效率公理的Shapley值变体表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 非线性公理化归因方法能够克服Shapley值线性性的局限，在归因任务中更有效。

title: TopoExplore: Topological Discrimination for Archive-Based Exploration
summary: Archive-based exploration methods such as Go-Explore select which visited state to return to using visitation rarity, and frontier methods return to the boundary of the unknown; neither asks whether the unexplored region behind a boundary is enterable at all. Exploration is not just about finding reward - it is about collecting a structurally complete experience for downstream learning and planning. We introduce TopoExplore, which augments Go-Explore cell selection with a periodic topological pass: enclosed unexplored regions (voids) of the visited-set occupancy grid are detected by flood fill (the H1 classes of its cubical complex), and a decaying selection bonus is placed only on their strict entrances (gap or door cells), so sealed regions are never targeted and entered regions retire. On a controlled 18-environment MiniGrid suite (15 seeds, frozen hyperparameters) TopoExplore attains a 1.52x geometric-mean speedup in median steps-to-first-entry over its exact Go-Explore ablation, versus 1.37x for a frontier baseline; frontier exploration degrades when sealed decoy structure appears (0.83-1.48x on decoy environments vs. 1.65-2.11x for TopoExplore), while TopoExplore holds its largest win on hard multi-interaction doors (10.9x). We report an honest negative on Montezuma's Revenge - without wall knowledge, unreachable occupancy artifacts capture the bonus and performance degrades as it grows, isolating the wall-aware entrance test as the load-bearing component - and a preliminary positive on HM3D scanned buildings, where the speedup over Go-Explore tracks scene difficulty (r=0.69) even as frontier selection dominates blanket coverage. The evidence supports a deliberately scoped claim: topology-aware selection pays off where enclosed structure must be discriminated, and remains competitive at open coverage, where frontier methods are strongest, despite not being tuned for that regime.

AI.tldr: 提出TopoExplore方法，通过拓扑分析检测封闭未探索区域（空洞）并仅对其入口施加探索奖励，在MiniGrid上取得1.52x加速，在Montezuma's Revenge上暴露了依赖墙体知识的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于存档的探索方法（如Go-Explore）和前沿探索方法只关注访问稀有度或未知边界，但没有判断未探索区域是否真的可进入（即是否存在封闭结构如门、墙等），导致探索效率低下。
AI.method: TopoExplore在Go-Explore的基础上增加周期性拓扑检测：对已访问区域的占位网格进行洪泛填充，检测封闭的未探索区域（空洞，即立方复形的H1类），仅对这些封闭区域的严格入口（间隙或门单元）施加衰减的探索奖励，从而避免针对密封区域进行无效探索，已进入的区域则退出奖励机制。
AI.result: 在18个环境的MiniGrid套件上，TopoExplore相比Go-Explore的中位首次进入步数几何平均加速1.52x；在含密封诱饵结构的环境中，前沿方法退化至0.83-1.48x，而TopoExplore达1.65-2.11x；在复杂多交互门上达到10.9x加速。在Montezuma's Revenge上无墙体知识时性能下降；在HM3D扫描建筑中有正相关（r=0.69）。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑感知的探索选择在需要区分封闭结构的环境中显著有效，在开放覆盖环境中也能与前沿方法保持竞争力，尽管未针对该场景调优。

title: Anamnesis: An Open-Source Platform for Large-Scale Backstory-Conditioned Survey Simulation
summary: We present Anamnesis, an interactive system for demographically controllable survey simulation using large language models. Open-source, and designed for non-technical users/researchers, Anamnesis enables the prototyping and stress-testing of survey instruments on virtual populations rather than real human subjects. The platform operationalizes the recently introduced Anthology and Alterity frameworks, which use structured narrative backstories to condition model responses, within a unified web interface. It supports open-ended generation, probabilistic demographic resampling, and multimodal (image and audio) surveys. We evaluate the system through two case studies: (1) replicating segments of Pew Research Center's American Trends Panel (ATP) on political typology and biomedical issues and (2) emulating human preference in the New Yorker Caption Contest. In both cases, Anamnesis produces opinion distributions that more closely match real-world survey data than standard persona-prompting baselines, offering a transparent, reproducible, and open-source alternative to proprietary simulation services.

AI.tldr: Anamnesis是一个面向非技术用户的开源交互系统，通过LLM和大规模叙事背景故事实现人口统计学可控的问卷模拟，在两项案例研究中比标准人格提示方法更接近真实调查数据。
AI.motivation: 传统问卷测试耗时长、成本高，且现有LLM模拟方法（如简单人格提示）缺乏人口统计学可控性和透明度，需要一种开源、可复现的替代方案。
AI.method: 基于Anthology和Alterity框架，使用结构化叙事背景故事来调节LLM响应；提供Web界面支持开放生成、概率性人口统计重采样和多模态（图像、音频）问卷。
AI.result: 在皮尤研究中心政治类型学和生物医学问题复制、以及纽约客标题竞赛偏好模拟两个案例中，Anamnesis产生的意见分布比标准人格提示基线更接近真实调查数据。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为问卷模拟提供了透明、可复现、开源且接近真实数据的替代方案，适用于非技术用户进行研究原型设计和压力测试。

title: LFD: Enabling Real-World Lensless Face Recognition with a Large-Scale Dataset
summary: Face recognition is a ubiquitously used computer vision task that has a wide range of applications ranging from everyday smartphone biometrics to high-stakes security systems. Most face recognition systems rely on traditional cameras, which often suffer from limitations such as bulky form factors, high costs, and limited privacy protection. To address these limitations, lensless cameras have emerged as an alternative. Lensless cameras use thin optical encoders, enabling smaller size, lower cost, and greater design flexibility. These cameras are typically paired with reconstruction algorithms that convert raw captures into recognizable images. However, reconstructed images often contain artifacts, and the reconstruction methods struggle to generalize well to real-world conditions. Furthermore, existing face datasets do not account for the artifacts present in lensless images. To address this issue, we introduce the Lensless Face Dataset (LFD). LFD comprises 21,080 lensless raw measurements, reconstructions, and standard images of faces captured under diverse lighting, angle, and distance. Our key contributions are: (1) Real-world lensless face data: LFD focuses on capturing a diverse face dataset with varying levels of artifacts introduced under different environments; (2) In-the-wild captures: 4,976 images are captured in outdoor settings with varying intensities of natural light and different background patterns; (3) Multiple lensless devices: LFD includes face images collected from three different types of lensless cameras, each with a unique optical encoder. We use this hardware diversity to demonstrate generalization across different lensless cameras. Through comprehensive evaluations and analysis, we show that LFD effectively captures shared features and artifacts across different lensless imaging devices, making it a valuable dataset for advancing lensless face recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Lensless Face Dataset (LFD)，一个包含21,080张无透镜相机人脸图像的数据集，旨在解决无透镜成像在人脸识别中的挑战，涵盖多种光照、角度、距离以及三种不同的无透镜相机设备。
AI.motivation: 传统人脸识别依赖的传统相机存在体积大、成本高、隐私保护有限等问题。无透镜相机虽能解决这些问题，但其重建图像存在伪影且泛化能力差，且现有数据集未考虑无透镜图像的伪影特征。
AI.method: 构建了LFD数据集，包含21,080张无透镜原始测量值、重建图像和标准人脸图像，涵盖不同光照、角度、距离条件下的室内外场景，并使用三种不同类型的无透镜相机采集数据。
AI.result: LFD数据集有效捕捉了不同无透镜成像设备间的共享特征和伪影，为推进无透镜人脸识别提供了有价值的基准。
AI.conclusion: LFD数据集填补了无透镜人脸识别领域的空白，通过多设备、多场景的多样化数据，有助于推动无透镜相机在人脸识别中的实际应用。

title: Serving the Long Tail: Training-Free LLM Candidate Generation for Vacation Rental Marketplaces
comment: Accepted at TSMO 2026 workshop, co-located with KDD 2026; 9 pages
summary: Vacation rental marketplaces face a structural imbalance on the supply side: a small fraction of properties receive most user interactions, while the long tail of new, niche, and seasonal listings generates too little behavioral signal for collaborative filtering to serve effectively. At Vrbo, item-based k-nearest neighbors (IBKNN) is a core candidate generation channel, but leaves tens of thousands of properties with no candidates and produces weak neighborhoods for sparsely interacted ones. We present a training-free, LLM-based candidate generation pipeline that complements IBKNN using static property metadata alone. An off-the-shelf LLM synthesizes diverse semantic queries per property, a pre-trained text encoder embeds them, and an approximate nearest-neighbor index retrieves candidates from an 11.7M-property catalog. A Union fusion strategy merges these with IBKNN while preserving the behavioral channel's ordering, guaranteeing no degradation on well-served properties, and a downstream learning-to-rank model re-scores the fused pool. Evaluated on 1.6M focal properties, the system extends candidate coverage to tens of thousands of properties IBKNN cannot reach, delivers its largest gains on the long-tail segment where behavioral methods are weakest, and matches or beats IBKNN at every K on shared properties. A downstream learning-to-rank stage further lifts the fused pool, yielding a complete candidate generation and re-ranking stack that serves the long tail without regressing well-served properties. We additionally show that Union fusion collapses the recall gap between a 3B open-weights LLM and frontier API-based models from 27-46% to under 1%, supporting self-hosted small-model deployment at marketplace catalog scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的无训练候选生成管道，利用静态属性元数据为Vrbo度假租赁市场中的长尾房源生成候选，弥补了IBKNN方法的覆盖不足，在1170万房源上验证了有效性，并证明Union融合策略可将小模型与大模型间的召回差距从27-46%缩小至1%以内。
AI.motivation: 度假租赁市场中存在供需结构不平衡：少数热门房源获得大部分用户交互，而大量长尾、季节性、新上架房源缺乏行为信号，导致基于协同过滤的IBKNN方法无法为这些房源生成有效候选或完全没有候选。
AI.method: 使用现成的LLM为每个房源综合生成多样化的语义查询，通过预训练文本编码器嵌入，再借助近似近邻索引从1170万房源库中检索候选；通过Union融合策略将LLM候选与IBKNN候选合并，保留行为通道的顺序，保证不降低热门房源的性能，最后由下游LTR模型重新排序。
AI.result: 在160万焦点房源上评估，系统覆盖了IBKNN无法触达的数万房源；在长尾段（行为方法最弱处）增益最大；在共享房源上每个K值均匹配或超越IBKNN；Union融合将3B开源模型与前沿API模型间的召回差距从27-46%缩小至1%以内。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的候选生成方法能有效解决长尾房源的冷启动问题，且可通过小模型自部署实现与大型API模型几乎无差距的性能，为大规模市场平台提供实用方案。

title: DynaFilter: Cloud-driven Dynamic Filtering for Satellite Edge Intelligence
comment: 15 pages, 23 figures, accepted by ACM MobiCom 2026
summary: Modern satellite edge systems, including those performing remote sensing tasks such object detection and tracking, are characterized by severely limited bandwidth and intermittent connections, making continuous data transmission to the cloud impractical. Existing edge-cloud systems, however, either require heavy pre-processing before analysis, for instance, full decompression of imagery data, or transmit all compressed data regardless of relevance. To address these challenges, we design DynaFilter, a dynamic filtering technique that enables satellite edge devices to perform selective region-of-interest (RoI) inference directly in the compressed-domain, without full decompression. Our key insight is that low-level compression syntax, specifically DC coefficients/AC energy in JPEG images and motion vectors in video streams, exhibits strong correlations with high-level semantic queries. By establishing a precise mapping between cloud query semantics and multimodal compressed-domain features, DynaFilter enables the edge to identify and transmit only relevant data associated to RoIs. Extensive evaluations show that DynaFilter reduces the total volume of pixel data for decoding and subsequent inference by 1.6x-7.1x for images, and achieves 92.0% bandwidth savings for video streams compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Furthermore, it decreases energy consumption by 43.1-88.6% on target devices and achieves a 1.6x-3.0x speedup in inference latency.

AI.tldr: DynaFilter是一种动态过滤技术，让卫星边缘设备直接在压缩域中执行感兴趣区域推理，无需完全解压，显著减少数据传输量、能耗和推理延迟。
AI.motivation: 卫星边缘系统带宽有限且连接不稳定，现有边缘-云系统要么需要完全解压后进行预处理，要么传输所有压缩数据，造成资源浪费。
AI.method: 利用低层压缩语法（JPEG的DC系数/AC能量、视频流中的运动向量）与高层语义查询之间的强相关性，建立云查询语义与多模态压缩域特征之间的精确映射，实现选择性感兴趣区域推理。
AI.result: 图像像素数据解码量减少1.6x-7.1x，视频流节省92.0%带宽，目标设备能耗降低43.1-88.6%，推理延迟加速1.6x-3.0x。
AI.conclusion: DynaFilter在压缩域进行动态过滤，有效解决了卫星边缘系统带宽和能耗瓶颈，实现了高效的选择性数据传输。

title: Nonparametric Bayesian Inverse Reinforcement Learning with Data-Parallel Gibbs Sampling
summary: Inverse Reinforcement Learning recovers reward functions from expert demonstrations, but standard formulations assume that all demonstrations come from a single expert. When demonstrations are pooled from multiple experts with distinct preferences, parametric methods recover an averaged reward that fits no individual expert well. We implement Nonparametric Bayesian Inverse Reinforcement Learning with a Dirichlet Process prior over reward functions, allowing the number of latent reward types to be inferred jointly with the rewards themselves. Inference uses a collapsed Gibbs sampler combining a Chinese Restaurant Process update for cluster assignments with a Metropolis-Hastings update for reward weights, and soft value iteration as the inner planning routine. We evaluate on a 10x10 ObjectWorld grid with two and three ground-truth reward types. The serial sampler recovers K=2 with Adjusted Rand Index of 1.000, substantially outperforming a Maximum Entropy IRL baseline (ARI=0.000). Extension to K=3 shows that the sampler correctly identifies the number of clusters in all runs; assignment ARI of 0.48-0.58 reflects behavioral overlap between expert types that persists across grid instantiations, revealing that reliable K=3 evaluation on ObjectWorld requires controlled object placement rather than random seeding. We further parallelize the sampler across CPU cores using Ray on HPC hardware, achieving a peak speedup of 4.79x at 8 workers, and characterize a throughput-versus-accuracy tradeoff arising from the consensus merge heuristic used during state aggregation. Code and a containerized environment are available at https://github.com/dasashreeya/np_bayes_irl.

AI.tldr: 本文提出非参数贝叶斯逆强化学习（NPB-IRL），使用狄利克雷过程先验从多专家混合演示中同时推断奖励函数的数量和参数，并在10x10网格环境中验证了有效性，同时实现了并行加速。
AI.motivation: 标准逆强化学习假设所有演示来自单一专家，但实际中常面临多个具有不同偏好的专家演示混合在一起的情况，传统参数化方法只能恢复对所有专家都不好的平均奖励。
AI.method: 采用狄利克雷过程（DP）作为奖励函数的先验，使用折叠吉布斯采样器（包含中国餐馆过程进行聚类分配、Metropolis-Hastings更新奖励权重、软值迭代作为内部规划），并利用Ray框架在HPC上实现并行化。
AI.result: 在10x10 ObjectWorld网格中，双专家场景下ARI达到1.000（远超最大熵IRL基线的0.000）；三专家场景下正确识别聚类数量，ARI为0.48-0.58；并行化在8个工作节点时达到4.79倍加速。
AI.conclusion: 非参数贝叶斯方法能有效从多专家演示中推断奖励类型数量和参数，并行化有效但需权衡吞吐量与准确性。

authors: Jose Luis Lima de Jesus Silva
title: A Symbolic Neural CPU for Quantization-Simulated Writeback and Interpretable Program Execution
summary: Neural networks can learn algorithmic input-output mappings, but trusting a learned executor requires more than a correct final answer because the state transitions that produce it are usually hidden. To make those transitions visible, we introduce a trace-supervised symbolic neural CPU, a factorized learned execution architecture that combines recurrent control, an explicit operation router over a fixed differentiable arithmetic-logic unit bank, destination-masked register writeback, complete trajectory supervision and matched fixed-point replay. The model exposes the selected operation, source and destination registers, register trajectory, memory signals and writeback semantics at every step. On the principal 16-wide benchmark, the non-quantized executor reproduces reference execution exactly, while the eight-bit quantization-simulated executor preserves the symbolic operation path through programs of 1,000 instructions. When the same execution is evaluated against a matched fixed-point replay, the residual numerical drift disappears, showing that it comes from a mismatch between continuous and low-precision reference semantics rather than from execution failure. We compare recurrent, Transformer, temporal-convolution, temporal graph-inspired and state-space controllers, and the ablations show that operation-gate supervision is necessary for an inspectable execution path. Hidden-opcode memory-pressure tasks expose the remaining limits in delayed state use and temporal binding. We also extend the interface with ValueMemory, hybrid adaptive leaky integrate-and-fire controllers, candidate-constrained symbolic control trained through behaviour cloning and actor-critic reinforcement learning, and an RV32I base-integer semantic bridge. Together, these results establish a trace-verifiable framework for interpretable, low-precision and controllable neural execution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种迹监督符号神经CPU架构，通过分解式学习执行架构（循环控制、显式操作路由器、固定可微分算术逻辑单元库、目标掩码寄存器写回、完整轨迹监督和匹配定点重放）来使神经网络的内部状态转换变得可见。实验表明在16位基准上非量化执行器能精确复现参考执行，8位量化也能保持符号操作路径。研究对比了多种控制器，并扩展了值记忆、混合自适应LIF控制器、行为克隆和强化学习训练等方法，建立了可迹验证的可解释、低精度、可控神经执行框架。
AI.motivation: 神经网络能学习算法映射，但状态转换通常是隐藏的，难以信任其执行过程。作者希望通过迹监督使内部状态转换可见，提升可解释性和可验证性。
AI.method: 提出符号神经CPU架构：循环控制 + 显式操作路由器 + 固定可微分ALU库 + 目标掩码寄存器写回 + 完整轨迹监督 + 匹配定点重放。对比了循环、Transformer、时序卷积、时序图启发、状态空间等多种控制器，并引入值记忆、自适应LIF控制器、行为克隆和强化学习训练等方法。
AI.result: 非量化执行器在16位基准上精确复现参考执行；8位量化执行器在1000条指令的程序中保持符号操作路径；匹配定点重放下数值漂移消失；操作门控监督对可检查执行路径是必要的；隐藏操作码和内存压力任务揭示了延迟状态使用和时间绑定的限制。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可迹验证的框架，实现了可解释、低精度、可控的神经执行，为神经符号系统提供了新的方向。

title: Knowledge Distillation for Automated AI Tutor Evaluation
summary: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into K-12 and higher education has outpaced the development of reliable methods for evaluating their pedagogical quality. As the research community starts to explore the space of automating evaluation of AI tutors, we introduce FATE (FLC AI Tutor Evaluator), a specialized 8B-parameter language model designed to evaluate AI tutors. Aligned with the four core evaluation tracks from the BEA 2025 Shared Task, our model assesses pedagogical ability across Mistake Identification, Mistake Location, Guidance, and Actionability. Because pedagogical evaluation is a specialized task with limited labeled data, we leverage knowledge distillation from a frontier LLM to generate additional supervision, yielding absolute performance gains up to 22.63 percentage points. Finally, we demonstrate FATE's utility as an automated evaluator by benchmarking instructional responses generated by popular commercial models, including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek. On average, we have found that Gemini 2.5 Flash perfomed best (82.88%), then ChatGPT 5.5 Instant (80.75%), followed by DeepSeek V4 Flash (80.13%) and Claude Sonnet 4.6 (74.00%).

AI.tldr: 提出了一个8B参数的专业评估模型FATE，用于自动评估AI导师的教学质量，在BEA 2025共享任务四个核心维度上表现出色，并通过知识蒸馏方法提升性能达22.63个百分点。
AI.motivation: LLM在K-12和高等教育中的快速应用缺乏可靠的教学质量评估方法，现有评估手段不足。
AI.method: 构建8B参数专用语言模型FATE，通过从前沿LLM进行知识蒸馏生成额外监督数据，在BEA 2025共享任务的四个评估轨道（错误识别、错误定位、指导性、可操作性）上进行训练。
AI.result: 性能提升最高达22.63个百分点；在评估主流商业模型时，Gemini 2.5 Flash表现最佳（82.88%），其次是ChatGPT 5.5 Instant（80.75%）、DeepSeek V4 Flash（80.13%）和Claude Sonnet 4.6（74.00%）。
AI.conclusion: FATE作为自动化评估工具能够有效评估AI导师的教学质量，知识蒸馏方法在小样本教学评估任务中效果显著。

title: WeaveEarth: Structured Evidence Construction and Reasoning for Training-Free UHR Remote Sensing Understanding
summary: Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) remote sensing image understanding requires Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to capture both the global scene layout and sparse yet task-critical local details under limited computational budgets. Existing methods mainly follow two paradigms. One is passive perception, which relies on resolution expansion or token compression and may therefore discard fine-grained details. The other is active perception, which depends on multi-round zooming and search, but suffers from high latency, contextual fragmentation, and error accumulation. We argue that a more effective path toward UHR understanding lies not in accessing more, but in organizing better. To this end, we propose WeaveEarth, a training-free framework that reformulates UHR understanding as a problem of structured evidence construction and reasoning under global context constraints. Specifically, WeaveEarth first employs Global-Aware Evidence Construction to select a compact, low-redundancy, and spatially complementary Minimal Support Evidence Set. It then introduces Structured Evidence Reasoning, which weaves local evidence, spatial metadata, and relative topology into a unified reasoning interface, thereby enhancing the VLM's ability to perform global-local joint reasoning. Extensive experiments show that WeaveEarth consistently outperforms strong baselines and existing UHR methods across multiple UHR remote sensing benchmarks and multiple frozen VLM backbones. Code is available at https://github.com/XianZhi-Ma/WeaveEarth.

AI.tldr: WeaveEarth是一个无需训练的高分辨率遥感图像理解框架，通过结构化证据构建与推理，在有限计算资源下提升VLM对全局场景和局部细节的联合理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有超高分遥感图像理解方法要么依赖分辨率扩展或token压缩（丢失细节），要么依赖多轮缩放搜索（高延迟、上下文碎片化、误差累积），缺乏更高效的组织方式。
AI.method: 提出WeaveEarth框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 全局感知证据构建，选取紧凑、低冗余、空间互补的最小支持证据集；2) 结构化证据推理，将局部证据、空间元数据和相对拓扑编织到统一推理接口中。
AI.result: 在多个UHR遥感基准和多个冻结VLM骨干上，WeaveEarth一致优于强基线和现有UHR方法。
AI.conclusion: UHR遥感图像理解的关键不在于获取更多信息，而在于更好地组织信息；WeaveEarth通过无需训练的结构化方法有效解决了该问题。

title: Remembering Distinct Items, Not Tokens: A Learnable Dirichlet-Process Cache Between State-Space Models and Attention
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures. Companion paper on event-log applications forthcoming
summary: Fixed-state sequence models compress an unbounded past into a bounded state, which caps their associative recall at roughly the state dimension; attention escapes the cap by keeping a key-value entry for every token, at quadratic compute and a cache that grows with the sequence. We study the middle ground: a sparse cache that allocates a slot only when an input is novel, so its size tracks the number of distinct items rather than the number of tokens. The allocation rule is the DP-means clustering rule, the small-variance limit of a Dirichlet-process mixture, used not as latent-variable inference but as the key-value memory operator for a deep recurrent backbone. We develop it in two forms, a static cache with a fixed concentration and a surprise-adaptive variant whose concentration follows the recent novelty rate. On a controlled associative-recall benchmark with redundancy we show that the cache matches full-attention recall while storing only the distinct items, that it dominates a fixed-budget eviction cache on the recall-versus-size frontier, and that on a state-space backbone it answers both a recall query and a long-range aggregate at the lowest memory of any model tested. The allocation is learnable end to end: a two-parameter novelty-threshold gate trained on the task loss alone recovers the rule exactly, whereas an over-parameterized gate fails, so the operative ingredient is the inductive bias rather than capacity. The evidence is a family of controlled mechanism studies at modest scale, with the distinct-items property confirmed on four real streams (recommendation, systems logs, clinical events, and insurance claims); a real-backbone, real-corpus language validation is pursued in a companion study.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于DP-means聚类的新型稀疏缓存机制，作为深度循环骨干网络的键值记忆算子，其缓存大小追踪不同输入项数量而非序列长度，在可控联想召回基准上以最低存储匹配全注意力召回性能。
AI.motivation: 传统固定状态序列模型将无限过去压缩为有限状态，联想召回能力受限于状态维度；注意力机制虽突破此限制但需为每个token保留键值条目，导致二次计算复杂度和随序列增长的缓存。作者希望探索中间地带：一种稀疏缓存，仅在输入新颖时分配槽位，使缓存大小追踪不同项数量而非token数量。
AI.method: 采用DP-means聚类规则（Dirichlet过程混合的小方差极限）作为键值记忆算子，而非用作潜变量推断。开发了两种形式：静态缓存（固定浓度参数）和惊喜自适应变体（浓度随最近新颖率变化）。门控机制可通过任务损失端到端学习，双参数新颖阈值门可精确恢复聚类规则。
AI.result: 在可控联想召回基准上，稀疏缓存匹配全注意力召回性能，仅存储不同项；在召回-大小前沿上优于固定预算驱逐缓存；在状态空间骨干网络上以最低存储同时回答召回查询和长程聚合查询。在四个真实流数据（推荐、系统日志、临床事件、保险索赔）上确认了不同项属性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的DP-means稀疏缓存机制在联想召回任务中以显著更低的存储成本达到了与全注意力相当的性能，其核心在于归纳偏差而非模型容量。该方法为长序列建模提供了一种高效记忆方案。

title: AgentAbstain: Do LLM Agents Know When Not to Act?
summary: Agent systems based on large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for autonomous tasks, yet existing evaluations mostly focus on task success rather than whether agents know when to abstain. This gap poses real risks: under ambiguity, conflicting constraints, or tool failures, agents may execute unintended and irreversible actions. To close this gap, we present the first systematic evaluation framework for agentic abstention: the calibrated ability of tool-using LLM agents to recognize when not to act. At its core, AgentAbstain is a paired-task benchmark built on an agent-native taxonomy of 8 abstention scenarios across pre-execution reasoning and runtime discovery. It contains 263 paired tasks across 42 executable sandbox environments, where each pair consists of a should-act task and a should-abstain variant produced through a controlled perturbation to the instruction, tool, or environment state. To scale this paired design and resist data contamination, we propose AbstainGen, a fully automated pipeline that synthesizes sandbox environments and generates paired tasks end-to-end, validated by deterministic replay and semantic LLM judges; fresh task instances can be regenerated on demand, and three independent annotators rate 94-98% of sampled tasks as well-designed. Across 17 frontier LLMs in 4 agent harnesses, the best agent (Gemini 3.1 Pro) achieves only 59.5% paired accuracy (correct on both the act and abstain sides of each paired task). More importantly, abstention capability is largely independent of general task-solving capability, indicating that scaling task-solving alone will not close this gap. We further identify failure modes such as post-hoc abstention, in which agents execute irreversible actions before recognizing abstention triggers. Our code and dataset are open-sourced at agentabstain.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AgentAbstain，首个系统评估LLM智能体在何时应当拒绝执行任务的框架，包含8类弃权场景的基准测试和自动化生成管道AbstainGen。最佳智能体（Gemini 3.1 Pro）的配对准确率仅59.5%，且弃权能力与任务解决能力基本独立。
AI.motivation: 现有评估大多关注任务成功率，忽略了智能体在模糊指令、冲突约束或工具故障时是否知道应该放弃执行，这可能导致不可逆的严重后果。
AI.method: 构建了AgentAbstain配对任务基准，包含8类弃权场景（执行前推理和执行中发现），覆盖42个沙盒环境的263个配对任务；每对包括应执行和应放弃两个变体。提出AbstainGen自动化管道，端到端合成沙盒环境并生成配对任务。
AI.result: 17个前沿LLM在4种智能体框架中测试，最佳模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro）配对准确率仅59.5%；弃权能力与任务解决能力大致独立；存在事后弃权等失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 仅通过提升任务解决能力无法弥补弃权能力的不足，需要专门关注智能体的弃权判断能力。

title: Unlocking Parallelism in Autoregressive Language Models via Speculative Decoding with Progressive Tree Drafting
summary: Speculative decoding has significantly accelerated Large Language Model (LLM) inference by alleviating memory-bound bottlenecks. However, traditional speculative decoding typically relies on auxiliary draft modules, incurring significant training and communication overhead. Although recent methods attempt to generate drafts within the target model itself, they often fail to fully exploit its latent parallel capacity due to a lack of structural coordination. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Progressive Tree Drafting (PTD)}, which employs a structured, guided parallel drafting strategy to harness the model's parallel potential. By coupling a progressive tree structure with a stepwise pruning mechanism, PTD actively guides the LLM to explore multiple semantic paths in a single forward pass, ensuring both draft diversity and coherence. Experiments demonstrate that PTD achieves up to $2\times$ decoding speedup across various benchmarks while remaining training-free and model-agnostic. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MINE-USTC/PTD.

AI.tldr: 提出渐进式树状草稿生成（PTD）方法，通过结构化并行草稿策略加速LLM推理，实现最高2倍解码加速，无需训练且模型无关。
AI.motivation: 传统推测解码依赖辅助草稿模块，存在训练和通信开销大；现有自草稿方法缺乏结构化协调，未能充分利用模型的并行潜力。
AI.method: 采用渐进式树状结构耦合逐步剪枝机制，在单次前向传播中引导LLM探索多条语义路径，保证草稿多样性与连贯性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上实现最高2倍解码加速，且无需训练、模型无关。
AI.conclusion: PTD通过结构化并行草稿策略有效释放LLM的并行潜力，是一种高效、通用且无需额外训练的推理加速方法。

title: TextGaze: Prompting Gaze Target Estimation with Textual Scene Cues
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2026. All contents are available at: https://github.com/idremo/TextGaze-IJCAI2026
summary: Gaze target estimation aims to infer the position of a person's gaze within a scene. Within mainstream design logic, multi-branch methods require extra supervision and annotations, while streamlined designs prioritize low-level visual saliency over true gaze intent. The former leads to a high annotation burden and hinders domain transfer, whereas the latter causes misalignment between predicted attention and actual gaze targets. To address this issue, we propose TextGaze, a unified cross-modal architecture that leverages a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM) as scalable semantic guidance to balance the two design paradigms. The model extracts visual features from a frozen encoder and utilizes an LVLM to obtain gaze-aligned textual cues. We design a transformer-based fusion module with hierarchical text supervision to preserve task semantics. Lightweight decoding heads enable the joint prediction of gaze heatmaps and in-/out-of-frame status. We evaluate our method on four mainstream datasets, and the results show competitive performance across key metrics with robust cross-dataset generalisation without extra fine-tuning. Overall, we provide a streamlined alternative to traditional designs and highlight the potential of LVLMs as accessible auxiliary guidance for gaze estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出TextGaze，一种利用大型视觉语言模型作为语义指导的统一跨模态架构，用于视线目标估计，在无需额外微调的情况下实现了跨数据集的稳健泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有视线目标估计方法存在两难：多分支方法需要额外监督和标注，导致标注负担高且阻碍领域迁移；简化设计则优先考虑低级视觉显著性而忽略真实视线意图，导致预测注意力与实际目标不一致。
AI.method: 提出TextGaze，一种基于LVLM的跨模态架构：从冻结编码器提取视觉特征，利用LVLM获取视线对齐的文本线索，设计基于Transformer的融合模块并引入分层文本监督保持任务语义，使用轻量化解码头联合预测视线热图和帧内/外状态。
AI.result: 在四个主流数据集上评估，结果在关键指标上表现出竞争力，且无需额外微调即可实现稳健的跨数据集泛化。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种传统设计的精简替代方案，突出了LVLM作为可访问的辅助指导在视线估计中的潜力。

title: SMETA-ZSL:Semantic Meta-Alignment for Zero-Shot Threat Classification
summary: Cybersecurity systems must adapt rapidly to emerging threats. However, labeled data for new threat categories is unavailable when those threats first appear. Generalized zero-shot learning offers a natural solution by enabling recognition of unseen classes through auxiliary semantic knowledge rather than labeled examples. Large language models are particularly promising in this setting because they can convert unstructured CTI reports into semantic prototypes for emerging threats. However, applying language-driven zero-shot learning to cybersecurity is difficult due to strong semantic overlap between threat descriptions, heterogeneity between behavioral attributes and text, severe class imbalance, and open-set conditions where unseen threats are unknown during training. We propose SMETA-ZSL, that learns semantic prototypes from overlapping language descriptions through contrastive finetuning, aligns behavioral features through episodic meta-learning and knowledge distillation, and performs adaptive routing for generalization across seen-unseen classes. Across 7 benchmarks, SMETA-ZSL delivers the strongest overall generalized zero-shot performance under the strictest inductive setting, surpassing prior methods by 10.8 points on average, with gains up to 18.1 points. Github:https://github.com/Security-And-Intelligence-Lab-UTEP/SMETA-ZSL

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMETA-ZSL，一种结合大语言模型和元学习实现网络安全领域广义零样本学习的方法，在7个基准上平均超越先前方法10.8个百分点。
AI.motivation: 网络安全系统需快速适应新威胁，但新威胁出现时缺乏标注数据。广义零样本学习可利用辅助语义知识识别未见类别，大语言模型能将非结构化CTI报告转化为语义原型，但面临语义重叠、特征异质性、类别不平衡和开放集等挑战。
AI.method: SMETA-ZSL包含三部分：1）通过对比微调从重叠语言描述中学习语义原型；2）通过情景元学习和知识蒸馏对齐行为特征；3）执行自适应路由以实现已见/未见类别的泛化。
AI.result: 在7个基准上，SMETA-ZSL在严格的归纳设置下取得最强广义零样本性能，平均超越先前方法10.8个百分点，最高提升18.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: SMETA-ZSL有效解决了语言驱动零样本学习在网络安全领域的挑战，显著提升了新威胁识别的泛化能力。

title: From ambiguous utterances to governed reuse classes: canonicalization, quotient invariance, and conditional decidability
summary: Semantic caching defines answer reuse on embedding similarity: two utterances share a stored answer when a similarity score clears a threshold, with no notion of authorization, versioning, or of what makes two demands the same. This note changes the object on which reuse is defined: in a governed domain, reuse should operate on a mathematically characterized quotient of resolved conversational demands, not on a similarity heuristic. Three independently defined relations on resolved utterances -- reading identity, resolution identity, and reuse identity -- form a refinement chain, strict under realized nondegeneracy conditions checkable on deployment logs; the pipeline's outputs are invariant along the chain, and reuse identity is exactly the kernel of the resolution map into the governed answer partition, so the reuse quotient is the utterance-side object that partition induces, not a relabeling of it. Reuse identity licenses the governed query key and its certified answer space; reuse of a particular answer requires resolution identity or an applicability certificate. The supporting layer is stated at exactly the strength proved: exact-denotation normal forms; join aggregation as a design operator, with closure-stable cells characterizing no-escape; total computability of the full pipeline relative to an untrusted proposal layer; policy admissibility for arbitrary proposers -- and provably not factual grounding or intent fidelity; and elicitation terminating after finitely many informative replies, sound under target consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在受管领域中，语义缓存应基于数学定义的会话需求商集进行复用，而非基于嵌入相似性阈值，并构建了由阅读同一性、解析同一性和复用同一性组成的精化链及其形式化框架。
AI.motivation: 现有语义缓存依赖嵌入相似性阈值判断问答复用，缺乏对授权、版本控制和需求等价性的形式化定义，在受管领域（如合规场景）中不可靠。
AI.method: 提出三层同一性关系（阅读同一性→解析同一性→复用同一性）构成的精化链，定义复用商集作为受管答案分区的商对象，并形式化证明管道输出沿该链不变、复用同一性恰恰是解析映射的核。
AI.result: 复用同一性授予受管查询键及其认证答案空间；特定答案的复用需要解析同一性或适用性证书。整个管道相对于不可信提议层是完全可计算的，策略对任意提议者可接受。
AI.conclusion: 在受管领域，缓存复用应基于数学定义的商结构而非相似性启发式，所提框架提供了可证明正确的替代方案。

title: A Corpus of Persuasion Techniques in Slavic Languages
comment: Corpus used for SlavicNLP 2025 Workshop co-located with ACL 2025, Published at LREC 2026
summary: Persuasion techniques are powerful rhetorical devices used to sway public opinion in a wide range of media. We present a new corpus of persuasion techniques, focusing on Slavic languages. The corpus contains documents in Bulgarian, Polish, and Russian, annotated with persuasion techniques at the coarse-grained text-span level and fine-grained sentence level. The techniques are drawn from a taxonomy of 25 fine-grained persuasion techniques, grouped under six broad categories of rhetorical persuasion strategies. The corpus contains approximately 7500 text spans from 222 documents that cover topics hotly debated at the national and international levels. We describe the corpus creation process, provide detailed statistics, and examine correlations between topics and persuasion techniques. We use classic ML-based and generative AI-based models to provide baselines and benchmark results for the detection and classification of persuasion techniques at the text-span level and sentence level.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了针对斯拉夫语言（保加利亚语、波兰语、俄语）的说服技巧语料库，包含约7500个文本跨度，涵盖25种细粒度说服技巧，并提供了基于经典机器学习和生成式AI的基线检测结果。
AI.motivation: 现有说服技巧语料库主要集中在英语等主流语言，缺乏对斯拉夫语言的研究，因此需要构建多语言语料库以推动该领域在低资源语言上的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含25种细粒度说服技巧（分为6大类）的语料库，在粗粒度文本跨度级别和细粒度句子级别进行标注；使用经典ML模型和生成式AI模型进行基线实验。
AI.result: 语料库包含222篇文档、约7500个文本跨度，覆盖保加利亚语、波兰语和俄语；提供了说服技巧检测与分类的基准结果。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库为斯拉夫语言的说服技巧检测研究提供了重要资源，经典ML和生成式AI模型的结果可作为后续研究的基线。

title: FlowPainter: Inpainting Optical Flow via Confidence-Guided Completion
summary: Existing optical flow methods broadly follow two paradigms: iterative optimization and diffusion-based estimation. Iterative methods, exemplified by RAFT, achieve high accuracy through recurrent refinement, but remain challenged by large displacements and complex motion. Diffusion-based methods introduce generative modeling and show promise in such ambiguous regions. However, existing diffusion models usually denoise the entire dense flow field from Gaussian noise, including simple regions where reliable motion can already be estimated by a lightweight network. This increases the denoising burden and may cause slow convergence and unstable training. To address this issue, we introduce FlowPainter, a diffusion-based optical flow framework that reformulates dense-flow generation as confidence-guided soft inpainting. FlowPainter employs a lightweight confidence-aware network to predict a rough flow and a pixel-wise confidence mask, distinguishing reliable simple regions from uncertain hard regions. The resulting simple-flow prior is used for confidence-based initialization and further injected into iterative denoising through confidence-gated residual guidance. With dynamically decaying guidance strength, FlowPainter stabilizes early denoising while preserving the flexibility of the diffusion model for late-stage detail refinement. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks, including Sintel, KITTI, and Spring, show that FlowPainter achieves strong accuracy under comparable training settings and converges more efficiently than existing diffusion-based optical flow methods, with notable gains on challenging benchmark splits. Our approach offers a practical way to integrate reliable discriminative priors with diffusion-based refinement for optical flow estimation. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/mya012/FlowPainter.

AI.tldr: FlowPainter提出了一种基于扩散模型的光流估计框架，通过置信度引导的软修复策略，将简单区域的粗略光流作为先验注入扩散去噪过程，从而降低纯扩散模型的去噪负担，提升收敛速度和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散光流方法从高斯噪声中恢复整个密集光流场，包括简单区域也能被轻量网络估计的部分，这增加了去噪负担，导致收敛慢和训练不稳定。
AI.method: 提出FlowPainter框架：1）轻量级置信感知网络预测粗糙光流和像素级置信度掩码；2）基于置信度的初始化；3）置信度门控残差引导的迭代去噪；4）动态衰减的引导强度策略。
AI.result: 在Sintel、KITTI、Spring等基准测试上达到强精度，收敛比现有扩散光流方法更高效，在困难数据上表现尤其突出。
AI.conclusion: 将可靠判别性先验与扩散模型结合是一种实用且有效的光流估计策略。

title: A Foundation Model for Multimodal Event Sequences in Financial Applications
summary: Predictive modeling is a core component of modern financial services, where a wide range of tasks are traditionally addressed using separate models trained on manually engineered tabular features. This task-specific approach limits reuse and makes it difficult to fully exploit heterogeneous data sources such as transaction histories and digital interaction signals. In this paper, we present an approach based on pretraining a foundation transformer model on multimodal sequences of user events. Events from multiple data sources are unified into a single chronological sequence, enabling early fusion of heterogeneous modalities and learning of general-purpose representations via a next-event prediction objective. These representations are combined with existing engineered user features, on top of which lightweight neural models are trained for multiple downstream tasks. The proposed system outperforms traditional task-specific models while reducing development overhead. The approach was deployed in production at one of the biggest banks in Eastern Europe, resulting in measurable improvements in business metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多模态事件序列预训练的基础Transformer模型，统一处理异构数据源，通过下一事件预测学习通用表征，并在东欧某大型银行生产环境中部署，优于传统模型。
AI.motivation: 传统金融预测建模采用任务特定模型+手动特征工程，难以复用且无法充分利用交易记录、数字交互信号等异构数据源。
AI.method: 将多种数据源的用户事件统一为时间序列，使用Transformer进行多模态早期融合，通过下一事件预测目标预训练，学习通用表征，再结合已有特征训练轻量下游模型。
AI.result: 系统在多个下游任务上优于传统任务特定模型，降低了开发开销，并在东欧某大型银行生产部署中带来可衡量的业务指标提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于多模态事件序列预训练的基础模型能有效替代传统任务特定方法，是金融领域的一种可行范式。

title: MAG: A Web-Agent Benchmark and Harness for Multimodal Action and Guide Generation
comment: 8 pages main text, 21 pages total including appendices; 11 figures, 7 tables, 2 algorithms. Benchmark, harness, and model checkpoints to be released
summary: Digital Adoption Platforms (DAPs) are embedded overlays widely used on web systems to guide users through operations inside a page, helping them get started with unfamiliar interfaces quickly. Completing a real task, however, rarely means clicking a few buttons on a single page: it takes a sequence of actions that unfolds across changing page states. Prior studies have also treated automated web agent actions and guide text generation as two separate problems, and most of them feed models textual page representations such as the DOM or accessibility trees rather than the rendered screens that humans actually operate on. In this work we introduce MAG, the first benchmark that unifies task execution and guide writing into a single Multimodal Action and Guide task, with two grounding schemes over screenshots: Set-of-Mark element selection and raw pixel coordinates. We further build a complete harness for this compound task, covering annotation with LLM assistance and human verification, training, evaluation in live environments, and joint metrics for actions and guides. With this harness we evaluate frontier API models and open multimodal models, and report detailed analyses. Finally, we design a GRPO training method augmented with expert trajectories, which nearly doubles the success rate of a supervised 9B agent (from 6.9% to 13.2%) and improves guide quality at the same time. Even the strongest model completes fewer than 40% of the tasks, leaving ample room for future research.

AI.tldr: 提出了MAG基准，首个统一任务执行与指导文本生成的多模态动作与指导任务，并设计了GRPO训练方法提升9B代理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将自动化Web代理动作与指导文本生成视为两个独立问题，且大多使用文本化页面表示（如DOM）而非人类操作的渲染截图，缺乏统一基准。
AI.method: 构建MAG基准，统一任务执行与指导书写为多模态任务，支持Set-of-Mark元素选择和原始像素坐标两种定位方案；设计了包含LLM辅助标注、人工验证、训练、评估和联合指标的完整框架；并提出了基于专家轨迹增强的GRPO训练方法。
AI.result: 最强模型完成任务不到40%；GRPO方法将监督训练的9B代理成功率从6.9%提升至13.2%，同时改善了指导质量。
AI.conclusion: MAG基准为Web代理任务执行与指导生成提供了统一评估平台，当前模型仍有较大提升空间。

title: The First ChineseBabyLM Challenge: training data-efficient and cognitively plausible language models for Chinese
summary: This paper describes the first ChineseBabyLM challenge, which will be held in the 2026 NLPCC conference. The challenge calls for researchers to train language models from scratch with 100 million Chinese tokens and evaluates the models on 3 tracks of tasks: NLU, cognitive alignment and Hanzi knowledge. There is no restriction on tokenizer, model architecture and the number of training epochs. Details of the challenge can be found in https://chinese-babylm.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了将在2026年NLPCC会议上举办的首届ChineseBabyLM挑战赛，要求研究者使用1亿中文token从头训练语言模型，并在NLU、认知对齐和汉字知识三个任务轨道上进行评估。
AI.motivation: 推动中文语言模型从小规模数据训练的研究，促进中文NLP领域的发展。
AI.method: 组织挑战赛，提供1亿中文token训练数据，设置三个评估轨道（NLU、认知对齐、汉字知识），不限制分词器、模型架构和训练轮数。
AI.result: 将在2026年NLPCC会议上公布参赛结果。
AI.conclusion: ChineseBabyLM挑战赛为中文语言模型从小数据训练研究提供了标准化评估平台。

title: REVA-PO: Stabilizing Reinforcement Learning for Chest X-ray Report Generation
summary: Automated chest X-ray report generation has recently benefited from reinforcement learning (RL) and large language models. However, RL training often suffers from instability or limited exploration due to fixed Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization and a static reference policy that accumulates KL pressure over time. We propose Response-Weighted and Validation-Anchored Policy Optimization (REVA-PO), a RL framework that stabilizes long-term training via Response-Weighted Regularization (RER) and Validation-Anchored Policy Reset (VAPR). RER dynamically adjusts per-response KL weights based on advantage and reference-policy entropy, relaxing constraints for high-quality responses while tightening them for low-quality ones. Complementarily, VAPR periodically synchronizes the reference and current policies to the best validation checkpoint, resetting accumulated regularization pressure to expand the viable exploration space. To ensure a robust starting point, we employ a three-stage pipeline consisting of warm-up training, classifier-guided supervised fine-tuning, and RL. Extensive evaluations on MIMIC-CXR and IU-Xray demonstrate that REVA-PO sets new state-of-the-art benchmarks in both linguistic quality and clinical accuracy. Notably, BLEU-4 improves by 5.1% on MIMIC-CXR and 3.6% on IU-Xray, while CheXpert F1 and RadGraph F1 scores increase by 4.5% and 12.8%, respectively, over prior leading methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/LiGuo12/REVA_PO/.

AI.tldr: 提出REVA-PO框架，通过响应加权正则化和验证锚定策略重置，提升胸部X光报告生成的RL训练稳定性，在MIMIC-CXR和IU-Xray上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: RL训练存在因固定KL正则化和静态参考策略导致的训练不稳定或探索受限问题，KL压力随时间累积。
AI.method: 提出REVA-PO框架，包含两个核心组件：RER（基于优势和参考策略熵动态调整每个响应的KL权重）和VAPR（周期性将参考策略同步到最佳验证检查点，重置累积的KL压力）。采用三阶段流水线：预热训练、分类器引导的SFT、RL。
AI.result: MIMIC-CXR上BLEU-4提升5.1%，IU-Xray上提升3.6%；CheXpert F1提升4.5%，RadGraph F1提升12.8%。
AI.conclusion: REVA-PO在语言质量和临床准确性上均达到新SOTA，代码已开源。

title: Optimizing ARDL Models for Retail Sales Forecasting and Fair Pricing
summary: Pricing food products to balance profitability with consumer welfare is a central challenge for retailers. Dynamic pricing is widely used to maximize revenue, yet most pricing models optimize business objectives while overlooking consumer fairness. This paper studies the risk of consumer exploitation under dynamic food pricing in Canada and proposes a methodology that embeds fairness constraints directly into retail sales forecasting. We model total retail trade sales with a log--log Autoregressive Distributed Lag (ARDL) specification, in which the coefficient on a product price is a sales elasticity, and pose the pricing problem as maximizing forecast sales subject to price bounds anchored to the Consumer Price Index (CPI). We solve this problem with both Linear Programming (LP) and Simulated Annealing (SA), under single-product and multi-product configurations. A key finding is that the fitted nominal elasticities are positive. As a result, an unconstrained sales-maximizer would push every price to its upper bound, and the CPI ceiling is the safeguard that prevents this. Simulated Annealing instead settles on conservative, interior prices that lower consumer cost while still meeting the sales target. We benchmark forecast accuracy against naive, seasonal-naive, ARIMA, and SARIMA baselines, and a CPI-deflated re-specification shows that the positive nominal elasticities are largely an inflation-driven artifact. The result is a transparent, fairness-aware pricing framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在动态食品定价中嵌入公平性约束的方法，通过ARDL模型和CPI锚定的价格上限，防止消费者被剥削，并用模拟退火算法找到兼顾销售目标与消费者成本的保守定价。
AI.motivation: 现有动态定价模型主要优化商业目标，忽视了消费者公平性，可能导致消费者被剥削。
AI.method: 使用对数-对数ARDL模型建模零售销售额，将价格系数视为销售弹性；定价问题转化为在CPI锚定价格边界下最大化预测销售额，分别用线性规划和模拟退火求解。
AI.result: 名义弹性为正，无约束时定价会推到上界；CPI上限可防止剥削；模拟退火给出保守内部价格，降低消费者成本同时满足销售目标；正名义弹性主要是通胀驱动。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种透明、公平性感知的定价框架，平衡了零售商盈利与消费者福利。

title: Looped State-Space Language Models with Adaptive Exit-State Selection
summary: Recent work on looped language models suggests that many reasoning problems benefit from greater computational depth rather than from additional independent parameters. Existing studies, however, focus almost exclusively on Transformer backbones, leaving open whether this principle also applies to state-space language models. We investigate Looped Mamba and Looped Hybrid Mamba-Transformer architectures, which repeatedly apply a shared Mamba (or hybrid) block to introduce explicit finite-depth recurrent computation. On two controlled reasoning tasks-Mano (modular-arithmetic manipulation) and p-hop induction-Looped Mamba consistently outperforms parameter-matched non-looped baselines and, in several settings, matches or exceeds non-looped models of equal effective depth. We then extend the study to language model pre-training under matched iso-parameter and iso-FLOPs protocols, which jointly disentangle the effects of parameter sharing and effective depth: looped models remain competitive on downstream benchmarks with substantially fewer distinct parameters, although deeper non-looped models retain an advantage in validation perplexity under strict iso-FLOPs comparisons. Finally, we adapt Ouro's two-stage exit gate to Looped Mamba for threshold-controlled selection among recurrent-step outputs. Since all recurrent steps are still executed, the selected exit step represents prediction depth rather than reduced wall-clock computation. At the scales studied, adaptive exit-state selection improves downstream performance at intermediate depths, while actual inference-time savings require additional state-handling mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文研究循环状态空间语言模型（Looped Mamba和Looped Hybrid Mamba-Transformer），发现通过重复使用共享模块增加计算深度可以提升推理任务性能，但在严格等FLOPs下深度非循环模型在验证困惑度上仍具优势。
AI.motivation: 探究循环计算（计算深度）是否适用于状态空间语言模型，而不仅限于Transformer架构。
AI.method: 提出了Looped Mamba和Looped Hybrid Mamba-Transformer架构，通过重复共享Mamba或混合块实现显式有限深度循环计算，并在推理任务和语言模型预训练上进行实验。
AI.result: Looped Mamba在Mano和p-hop induction任务上优于参数匹配的非循环基线；在等参数设置下具竞争力，但严格等FLOPs下深度非循环模型在验证困惑度上更优。
AI.conclusion: 循环计算在状态空间模型中有效，但需要额外的状态处理机制才能在推理时实现实际计算节省。

title: Trust Before Fusion: QIMG-7 and Source-Aware Resolution for Polluted Multimodal RAG
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures, 23 tables. Preprint under review
summary: Multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is often evaluated with clean evidence, yet real retrieval can return topically relevant but unreliable content: false text and misleading images from corrupted metadata, entity swaps, typographic overlays, semantic edits, adversarial patches, blends, or style transfer. We introduce QIMG-7, a controlled benchmark for multimodal retrieval pollution in multi-sentence factual QA, spanning four datasets, seven image-attack families, and 16 paired clean/polluted regimes, for 1,760 evaluation rows per method. Across four generator/gate stacks, naive multimodal fusion is brittle: in the main gpt-4o-mini stack, Full-MM support drops from 0.908 with clean text to 0.490 with polluted text, often making Parametric fallback safer than retrieval. We propose source-aware trust resolution (SATR), a training-free approach that compares Parametric, Text-only, and Full-MM candidate answers and selects among candidate answers or falls back based on source reliability. The Field-Selector variant achieves the best balanced score, 0.816, improving over Full-MM by 11.7 points and over the Cascaded Router by 2.7 points. Ablations show that, in this text-first setting, explicit text-reliability modeling is the dominant driver of these gains. Overall, in text-first factual QA with multimodal retrieval conflict, our results support selective trust rather than unconditional fusion. Artifacts are available at https://github.com/SaadElDine/Trust_Before_Fusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个受控的多模态检索污染基准QIMG-7，发现朴素多模态融合在面对检索污染时表现脆弱，并提出了无需训练的源感知信任解析方法（SATR），通过选择可靠来源的答案而非无条件融合来提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态RAG评估通常使用干净的证据，但真实检索返回的内容可能存在各种污染（虚假文本、误导性图像等），现有方法缺乏对此场景的系统研究和鲁棒解决方案。
AI.method: 构建QIMG-7基准（涵盖4个数据集、7种图像攻击家族、16种干净/污染对照，每方法1760条评估），提出SATR（源感知信任解析），包括Field-Selector变体，通过比较Parametric、Text-only和Full-MM候选答案并基于来源可靠性进行选择或回退。
AI.result: 在gpt-4o-mini栈中，Full-MM支持度从0.908（干净文本）降至0.490（污染文本）；SATR的Field-Selector达到0.816平衡分数，比Full-MM高11.7个点，比Cascaded Router高2.7个点。
AI.conclusion: 在存在多模态检索冲突的文本优先事实型QA中，应选择选择性信任而非无条件融合，显式文本可靠性建模是性能提升的主导因素。

title: EmoStyle: Affective Conditioning of Style-Specialist Experts for Emotional Image Generation
summary: Emotion-aware artistic image generation requires an image to match the input prompt, follow the specified artistic style, and convey the target emotion. In this challenge, the main difficulty is that the visual and affective attributes available in the training data are not explicitly provided at test time. Without these attributes, the generator has to decide not only what to depict, but also how the target emotion should be expressed through color, lighting, brushwork, composition, line, and layout. This creates a control gap between the available test prompt and the fine-grained conditions needed for emotion-aware artistic generation. To bridge this gap, we propose EmoStyle, a Z-Image-based framework that converts the input prompt into a structured generation state. An LLM reasoner first predicts affective cues (valence-arousal, dominant emotion, and therapeutic-effect labels) and an aspect-ratio decision. Instead of using these predictions only as additional prompt text, we encode the affective fields into an affective condition vector and inject it into the denoising blocks through AdaLN-style modulation. This allows the inferred control variables to directly guide the generation of intermediate features. Since emotional expression is also style-dependent, we further train a dedicated LoRA adapter for each artistic style bucket and select the corresponding expert during inference, enabling the same affective cues to be rendered with bucket-specific priors for color, texture, brushwork, and composition.
